title: Comment on "Efficient implementation of the superposition of atomic potentials initial guess for electronic structure calculations in Gaussian basis sets"
summary: In J. Chem. Phys. 152, 144105 (2020) Lehtola et al introduced the efficient Gaussian-basis representation of Superposition of Atomic Potentials (SAP) which "can be easily implemented in any Gaussian-basis quantum chemistry code in terms of two-electron integrals". Here we demonstrate that it is possible to evaluate Gaussian AO representation of SAP by nearly trivial modification of one-electron nuclear attraction integrals.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了一种通过简单修改单电子核吸引积分来计算高斯原子轨道表示SAP的方法
AI.motivation: Lehtola等人之前提出了SAP的高斯基表示，可以通过双电子积分实现。本文旨在展示更简单的方法。
AI.method: 通过几乎微不足道的修改单电子核吸引积分来计算高斯原子轨道表示的SAP
AI.result: 成功实现了通过修改单电子核吸引积分来评估SAP的高斯AO表示
AI.conclusion: SAP的高斯AO表示可以通过简单修改单电子核吸引积分来实现，这比之前使用双电子积分的方法更简单

title: Extended Lagrangian molecular dynamics on vibronic surfaces in the nuclear-electronic orbital framework
summary: Proton transfer is central to many processes of chemical interest. The simulation of proton transfer dynamics requires the inclusion of nuclear quantum effects, such as zero-point energy, nuclear delocalization, and tunneling. Herein, we introduce methods within the nuclear-electronic orbital (NEO) framework, where specified nuclei are treated quantum mechanically on the same level as the electrons, for the simulation of proton transfer dynamics. Specifically, NEO density functional theory is used to treat the transferring protons quantum mechanically, and the other nuclei are propagated classically on the adiabatic vibronic ground-state surface. We formulate a NEO extended Lagrangian molecular dynamics (NEO-ELMD) approach to incorporate the motion of the nuclear basis function centers during such simulations. Density matrix extrapolation and purification are introduced as a means to accelerate the NEO self-consistent field procedure at each time step by reducing the number of iterations required for convergence. We demonstrate the fidelity and efficiency of NEO-ELMD by comparison to related dynamics methods for intramolecular proton transfer in malonaldehyde. We also use these accelerated techniques to simulate the nonequilibrium single and double proton transfer dynamics of proton-coupled electron transfer in much larger benzimidazole-phenol systems. This work provides a foundation for future methodologies to efficiently simulate proton transfer dynamics within the NEO-DFT framework while incorporating nonadiabatic effects between adiabatic vibronic states.

AI.tldr: NEO-ELMD方法：在核-电子轨道框架下，将质子量子化处理，结合扩展拉格朗日分子动力学，加速质子转移动力学模拟
AI.motivation: 质子转移是化学过程中的核心现象，需要包含核量子效应（零点能、核离域、隧穿）。现有方法在模拟质子转移动力学时效率有限，特别是在处理大系统和非平衡过程时。
AI.method: 1. 采用核-电子轨道(NEO)密度泛函理论，将转移质子量子化处理；2. 其他原子核在绝热振动基态势面上经典传播；3. 提出NEO扩展拉格朗日分子动力学(NEO-ELMD)，包含核基函数中心的运动；4. 引入密度矩阵外推和纯化技术，加速自洽场收敛。
AI.result: 1. 在丙二醛分子内质子转移中验证了NEO-ELMD的准确性和效率；2. 成功应用于苯并咪唑-酚体系中更大的质子耦合电子转移系统的非平衡单/双质子转移动力学模拟。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在NEO-DFT框架下高效模拟质子转移动力学奠定了基础，未来可扩展到绝热振动态间的非绝热效应研究。

title: Ultrafast laser-driven quantum dynamics in positronium chloride
summary: We present a computational study of the laser-driven quantum dynamics of positronium (Ps), PsH, and PsCl at the time-dependent Hartree-Fock level of theory. To eliminate finite-basis effects and to properly capture continuum dynamics, we use a spherical polar pseudospectral representation. The multicomponent theory and its implementation are described in detail. We find that while the presence of the positron delays electron ionization in PsH, a slight enhancement of electron ionization is observed in PsCl. In both cases, the positronic response is faster than that of the electrons. We propose that the formation of PsCl may be directly observed through photopositron spectra in the multiphoton regime, where PsCl peaks are expected at roughly twice the energy of Ps peaks, making PsCl clearly distuinguishable from Ps. In the tunelling regime, however, photopositron rescattering peaks may only be distuinguishable if the amount of Ps is sufficiently low.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过计算模拟了正电子素(Ps)、PsH和PsCl在激光驱动下的量子动力学，发现PsH中正电子延迟电子电离，而PsCl中电子电离略有增强，正电子响应均快于电子响应。
AI.motivation: 研究激光驱动下正电子素及其化合物的量子动力学行为，探索正电子在分子系统中的独特作用，为实验观测提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用含时Hartree-Fock理论水平，使用球极坐标伪谱表示法消除有限基组效应并正确捕捉连续态动力学，详细描述了多组分理论及其实现。
AI.result: PsH中正电子延迟电子电离，PsCl中电子电离略有增强；正电子响应快于电子响应；多光子区域可通过光正电子谱直接观测PsCl形成，其峰能量约为Ps峰的两倍；隧道区域中光正电子再散射峰仅在Ps含量足够低时可区分。
AI.conclusion: 正电子在分子系统中对电子动力学有显著影响，PsCl的形成可通过光正电子谱在多光子区域直接观测，为实验探测正电子素化合物提供了理论依据。

title: Quantum Field Approaches to Chemical Systems
summary: Quantum-matter theory (QMT), based on the Schrödinger or Dirac equations, is firmly established for both intra- and intermolecular interactions. However, there are two key issues with QMT. First, its applicability to large molecular complexes is hindered by the relatively high computational cost of the calculations required to achieve high accuracy. Second, fields are also quantum objects that produce many intriguing effects beyond standard QMT approaches to molecular systems. This review focuses on recent developments in quantum-field theory (QFT) approaches to both covalent and non-covalent interactions for molecules in vacuum and subject to environments such as cavities and solvents. QFT provides a rich playground for novel chemical theories and insights. For example, chemical reactions and van der Waals interactions can be manipulated by cavities, boundaries, and optical excitations; novel interactions emerge when molecules interact with quantized fields; systems with millions of atoms could soon be treated with coarse-grained QFT formalisms; and unexpected scaling laws for atomic and molecular properties can emerge when QFT is applied to sets of chemical systems. This review sets the stage for an exciting QFT-driven path for further development of chemical theory.

AI.tldr: 这篇综述论文探讨了量子场论在化学理论中的应用，特别是针对分子间相互作用、腔体环境和溶剂效应等传统量子物质理论难以处理的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统量子物质理论（基于薛定谔或狄拉克方程）存在两个关键问题：1）计算成本高，难以应用于大型分子体系；2）无法充分处理量子场效应。量子场论为化学理论提供了新的发展路径。
AI.method: 采用量子场论方法研究共价和非共价相互作用，包括分子在真空、腔体和溶剂等环境中的行为。通过粗粒化QFT形式处理大型体系，探索量子场与分子相互作用的新现象。
AI.result: QFT为化学理论提供了丰富的可能性：腔体、边界和光学激发可以调控化学反应和范德华相互作用；量子场与分子相互作用产生新现象；粗粒化QFT可处理百万原子级体系；QFT揭示了原子分子性质的新标度律。
AI.conclusion: 量子场论为化学理论的进一步发展开辟了令人兴奋的新路径，特别是在处理复杂环境效应、大型体系和量子场相关现象方面具有独特优势。

title: Modeling Decay Heat with a Simplified Depletion Chain in OpenMC
summary: OpenMC can be used to computationally model depletion and produce estimates of decay heat. As an input to depletion simulations, OpenMC requires a depletion chain that details nuclide transmutation pathways. The simplified CASL depletion chain was designed to track relatively few nuclides while still accurately modeling the effective neutron multiplication factor and nuclide number densities. However, the CASL chain dramatically underestimates decay heat due to the many nuclides it does not contain. In this work, we modify the CASL depletion chain to improve its accuracy while maintaining its computational efficiency. We demonstrate the effectiveness of adding pseudo-nuclides to the CASL chain, with each pseudo-nuclide capturing the behavior of a large group of nuclides. We further introduce "delay nuclides," which dramatically improve the accuracy of decay heat estimates.

AI.tldr: 改进CASL燃耗链以提升衰变热计算精度，同时保持计算效率
AI.motivation: OpenMC使用CASL简化燃耗链进行燃耗模拟，该链虽然能准确计算中子增殖因子和核素密度，但严重低估衰变热，因为缺少许多核素
AI.method: 通过添加伪核素（每个代表一大组核素的行为）和引入"延迟核素"来改进CASL燃耗链
AI.result: 改进后的燃耗链显著提高了衰变热估算的准确性，同时保持了计算效率
AI.conclusion: 通过伪核素和延迟核素策略，可以在不显著增加计算成本的情况下有效提升CASL燃耗链对衰变热的预测精度

title: Real-space microscopic description of laser-pulse induced melting of superconductivity
summary: Quenching quantum order via laser pulses has proven a useful tool to access exotic physical effects in systems that are strongly perturbed out of equilibrium. However, theoretical modelling of experimental measurements is typically done phenomenologically or by assuming translational invariance due to the complexity of the problem. Here, we solve a microscopic real-space model of the time dynamics of a superconductor following an intense laser-pulse. We are able to reproduce recent experimental findings displaying a critical slowing-down of the melting of the order parameter for laser fluences close to the condensation energy. Moreover, we leverage the real-space resolution of our model to predict how phase fluctuations and currents in the system behave both spatially and temporally. We discover an unusual current flow in the superconductor after the pulse has subsided, resembling backward waves that normally require special engineering in metamaterials or wave guides. Our results predict a rich behavior of the superconducting order parameter at a microscopic level which is manifested in current textures that can be probed using radiation detection.

AI.tldr: 通过激光脉冲淬灭量子序来研究超导体非平衡动力学，发现接近凝聚能时有序参数熔化呈现临界减速现象，并预测了类似反向波的异常电流流动模式。
AI.motivation: 激光脉冲淬灭量子序已成为研究非平衡态奇异物理效应的有效工具，但现有理论模型通常采用唯象方法或假设平移不变性，缺乏微观实空间模型来描述超导体在强激光脉冲后的时间动力学。
AI.method: 建立并求解了超导体在强激光脉冲后的微观实空间模型，该模型能够处理系统的实空间分辨率，从而研究有序参数、相位涨落和电流的时空行为。
AI.result: 成功复现了实验中观察到的现象：当激光通量接近凝聚能时，有序参数的熔化呈现临界减速。更重要的是，模型预测了脉冲后超导体中异常的电流流动模式，这种模式类似于通常在超材料或波导中需要特殊工程设计的反向波。
AI.conclusion: 该研究预测了超导体有序参数在微观层面上的丰富行为，表现为可通过辐射探测技术检测的电流纹理结构，为理解非平衡态超导动力学提供了新的理论框架。

title: Resonant field emission from noble-metal/graphene heterostructures
comment: to appear in Nano Letters: 7 pages + references and supporting materials = 18 pages in total, including 4 main figures and 5 supplementary figures
summary: Field emission from metals underpinned early vacuum-tube technology, and recent nanoscale engineering made field-emission devices compatible with modern silicon platforms. However, the limited tunability of electron transport in metals has restricted their applicability. Here, we show that noble metals coated with graphene exhibit clean non-monotonic $I-V$ characteristics arising from resonant tunneling through graphene's electronic states, enabled by graphene's atomic thinness and weak electronic hybridization with noble metals. Our approach combines ab-initio interface parameters with exact solutions of the Schrödinger equation for electron transmission across the interface. We analyze two experimentally relevant geometries: a vertical configuration with a flat suspended emitter and a coplanar configuration with sharp electrodes allowing for strong field enhancement and gating. These results establish a practical route to tunable electron transport in metal heterostructures, positioning them as competitive components for air-channel field-emission nanoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 石墨烯涂覆的贵金属表现出由石墨烯电子态共振隧穿引起的非单调I-V特性，为金属异质结构中的可调电子传输提供了实用途径。
AI.motivation: 金属场发射技术早期应用于真空管，但金属电子传输的可调性有限，限制了其应用范围。需要开发具有可调电子传输特性的金属异质结构。
AI.method: 结合ab-initio界面参数与薛定谔方程精确解，分析电子通过界面的传输。研究两种实验相关几何结构：具有平坦悬浮发射器的垂直配置和具有强场增强与门控能力的尖锐电极共面配置。
AI.result: 石墨烯涂覆的贵金属表现出清洁的非单调I-V特性，这是由于通过石墨烯电子态的共振隧穿所致，得益于石墨烯的原子级薄度和与贵金属的弱电子杂化。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为金属异质结构中的可调电子传输建立了实用途径，使其成为空气通道场发射纳米电子学的竞争性组件。

title: Momentum-gapped quasiparticles in disordered metals
summary: Nature contains massless particles with linear dispersions, and massive particles whose energies depend quadratically on their momenta with finite mass gaps. Both have equivalents in condensed matter physics in the form of collective modes and quasiparticles, measurable excitations with well-defined energy-momentum relations. A hypothesised third particle type - the super-luminal tachyon - would have an undefined energy at low momentum. A similar collective mode - long hypothesised within the hydrodynamic theory of matter - would have a purely imaginary energy at low momentum, corresponding to a finite lifetime. This third possibility has never been directly observed in a quantum system. Through a careful comparison of hydrodynamics with microscopic models of metals, we establish that this previously unseen third dispersion occurs in correlated quantum matter whenever the electronic fluid undergoes momentum relaxation due to explicit breaking of translation by impurities. As a specific example of these momentum-relaxed modes we consider the recent discovery of an acoustic plasmon - dubbed Pines' demon - in Sr$_2$RuO$_4$. The observed dispersion of this neutral mode differed significantly from the massless linear behaviour predicted by the random phase approximation. We demonstrate that the observed dispersion corresponds, in fact, to a momentum-gapped quasiparticle.

AI.tldr: 论文发现了一种新的量子集体模式——动量弛豫模式，它在低动量下具有纯虚数能量，对应有限寿命，这种模式在Sr₂RuO₄中观测到的声学等离子体（Pines' demon）中首次被识别。
AI.motivation: 自然界存在线性色散的零质量粒子和具有质量间隙的二次色散粒子，但第三种假设的超光速粒子（快子）在低动量下能量未定义。类似地，在流体力学理论中长期假设存在一种在低动量下具有纯虚数能量的集体模式，但从未在量子系统中直接观测到。
AI.method: 通过仔细比较流体力学与金属微观模型，建立了动量弛豫模式的理论框架。以Sr₂RuO₄中发现的声学等离子体（Pines' demon）为具体案例，分析其色散关系。
AI.result: 发现当电子流体因杂质破坏平移对称性而发生动量弛豫时，会出现这种新型集体模式。观测到的声学等离子体色散关系并非随机相位近似预测的线性行为，而是对应动量带隙准粒子。
AI.conclusion: 首次在量子系统中直接观测到第三种色散模式——动量弛豫模式，为理解相关量子物质中的集体激发提供了新视角，并解释了Sr₂RuO₄中声学等离子体的异常色散行为。

title: On deforming and breaking integrability
summary: In this paper we study nearest-neighbour deformations of integrable models. After expanding in the deformation parameter, we identify four possible types of deformations. First there are deformations that simply break or preserve integrability. Then we find two different subtle cases. The first case is where the deformation is only integrable if all orders of the deformation parameter are taken into account. An example of these are the long-range deformations that appear in holographic models. The second case is when the deformation is perturbatively integrable to some order in the deformation parameter but can not be extended to an integrable model. In this paper we work this out for the XXZ spin chain and discuss the level statistics of each of these cases. We find numerical evidence that the onset of chaos occurs differently in each of these models. For the perturbatively integrable models, we find that the deformation strength at which chaos appears demonstrates a volume-scaling intermediate between strong and weak integrability breaking models.

AI.tldr: 研究可积模型最近邻形变的分类，发现四种形变类型，分析XXZ自旋链的能级统计，发现不同形变类型中混沌出现的机制不同。
AI.motivation: 研究可积模型的形变如何影响其可积性，特别是探索形变参数展开后不同类型的可积性破坏模式，以及这些形变如何影响量子系统的混沌行为。
AI.method: 对形变参数进行展开分析，识别四种可能的形变类型；以XXZ自旋链为具体模型进行研究；通过数值方法分析能级统计，观察混沌出现的特征。
AI.result: 发现四种形变类型：1)破坏可积性；2)保持可积性；3)仅考虑所有阶形变参数时才可积（如全息模型中的长程形变）；4)在形变参数特定阶数内可积但无法扩展到完整可积模型。数值证据表明不同形变类型中混沌出现的方式不同，微扰可积模型的混沌出现强度呈现介于强弱可积性破坏模型之间的体积标度行为。
AI.conclusion: 可积模型的形变存在多种不同类型，每种类型对可积性的影响机制不同，导致混沌行为的出现方式也不同，这为理解量子系统中可积性与混沌的转变提供了新的视角。

title: Machine intelligence supports the full chain of 2D dendrite synthesis
summary: Exemplified by the chemical vapor deposition growth of two-dimensional dendrites, which has potential applications in catalysis and presents a parameter-intensive, data-scarce and reaction process-complex model problem, we devise a machine intelligence-empowered framework for the full chain support of material synthesis, encompassing rapid process optimization, accurate customized synthesis, and comprehensive mechanism deciphering.First, active learning is integrated into the experimental workflow, identifying an optimal recipe for the growth of highly-branched, electrocatalytically-active ReSe2 dendrites through 60 experiments (4 iterations), which account for less than 1.3% of the numerous possible parameter combinations.Then, a prediction accuracy-guided data augmentation strategy is developed combined with a tree-based machine learning (ML) algorithm, unveiling a non-linear correlation between 5 process variables and fractal dimension (DF) of ReSe2 dendrites with only 9 experiment additions, which guides the synthesis of various user-defined DF. Finally, we construct a data-knowledge dual-driven mechanism model by integration of cross-scale characterizations, interpretable ML models, and domain knowledge in thermodynamics and kinetics, unraveling synergistic contributions of multiple process parameters to the product morphology. This work demonstrates the ML potential to transform the research paradigm and is adaptable to broader material synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出机器学习驱动的材料合成全链条框架，通过活性学习优化工艺、数据增强策略预测形貌、数据知识双驱动模型解析机理，应用于二维ReSe2枝晶生长。
AI.motivation: 针对化学气相沉积生长二维枝晶这一参数密集、数据稀缺、反应过程复杂的模型问题，开发机器学习框架以支持材料合成的全链条研究，包括工艺优化、定制合成和机理解析。
AI.method: 1) 将活性学习整合到实验流程中，通过60次实验（4次迭代）优化工艺参数；2) 开发预测精度引导的数据增强策略结合树基机器学习算法，仅用9次额外实验建立过程变量与分形维度的非线性关系；3) 构建数据知识双驱动机理模型，整合跨尺度表征、可解释ML模型以及热力学和动力学领域知识。
AI.result: 1) 活性学习在仅占可能参数组合1.3%的60次实验中找到了高分支、电催化活性ReSe2枝晶的最佳配方；2) 数据增强策略成功指导了各种用户定义分形维度枝晶的合成；3) 机理模型揭示了多个工艺参数对产物形态的协同贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了机器学习在转变材料合成研究范式方面的潜力，所提出的框架可适应更广泛的材料合成领域，为实现高效工艺优化、精准定制合成和全面机理解析提供了新途径。

title: In-phase current and temperature oscillations reduce PEM fuel cell resistivity: A modeling study
summary: We have developed a non-isothermal analytical model for the impedance of the cathode catalyst layer (CCL) in a PEM fuel cell. In-phase harmonic perturbations to the current density and temperature reduce the impedance and the static polarisation resistivity of the CCL due to lowering proton transport losses. A special selection of the current and temperature perturbation amplitudes allows for complete elimination of these losses.

AI.tldr: 开发了PEM燃料电池阴极催化剂层的非等温分析阻抗模型，电流密度和温度的同相谐波扰动可降低阻抗和静态极化电阻率
AI.motivation: 研究非等温条件下PEM燃料电池阴极催化剂层的阻抗特性，探索通过电流和温度扰动降低质子传输损耗的可能性
AI.method: 开发了阴极催化剂层的非等温分析阻抗模型，考虑电流密度和温度的同相谐波扰动对阻抗的影响
AI.result: 电流密度和温度的同相谐波扰动可降低阴极催化剂层的阻抗和静态极化电阻率，特殊选择的扰动振幅可完全消除质子传输损耗
AI.conclusion: 通过优化电流和温度扰动，可以有效降低PEM燃料电池阴极催化剂层的阻抗和质子传输损耗，提高燃料电池性能

title: ALPHANSO: Open-Source Modeling of ($α$,n) Neutron Source Terms
summary: Applications ranging from nuclear safeguards to dark matter detection require accurate predictions of neutron fields produced by ($α$,n) reactions. Legacy tools like SOURCES-4C remain widely used but suffer from significant limitations, including outdated nuclear data, missing target nuclides, and restricted accessibility. Here, we present ALPHANSO, an open-source Python package for calculating ($α$,n) neutron source terms. ALPHANSO incorporates modern nuclear data libraries and formats covering all naturally occurring target nuclides and provides a transparent, modular framework for updating or extending the data as new evaluations are released. Comparison with SOURCES-4C and experimental measurements across a range of elements and materials shows that ALPHANSO reproduces neutron yields and spectra that typically match or exceed the accuracy of existing codes. These results demonstrate that ALPHANSO is a reliable, accessible, modern replacement for legacy ($α$,n) source term codes. Its open-source design and modular data handling make it readily extensible to future evaluated nuclear data and low-background applications.

AI.tldr: ALPHANSO是一个开源Python包，用于计算(α,n)中子源项，旨在替代过时的SOURCES-4C工具，提供更准确、可访问的中子场预测。
AI.motivation: 从核保障到暗物质探测等应用需要准确的(α,n)反应中子场预测。现有工具如SOURCES-4C存在核数据过时、目标核素缺失、可访问性受限等显著局限性。
AI.method: 开发了开源Python包ALPHANSO，整合现代核数据库和格式，覆盖所有天然存在的目标核素，提供透明、模块化的框架以便更新或扩展数据。
AI.result: 与SOURCES-4C和实验测量对比显示，ALPHANSO产生的中子产额和能谱通常匹配或超过现有代码的准确性，能够可靠替代传统(α,n)源项代码。
AI.conclusion: ALPHANSO是一个可靠、可访问、现代化的传统(α,n)源项代码替代品，其开源设计和模块化数据处理使其易于扩展到未来的核数据评估和低本底应用。

title: Interplay of superconductivity and ferromagnetism in ferromagnetic semiconductor-based Josephson junctions
summary: The interplay between superconductivity and ferromagnetism has long been pursued as a route to unconventional Josephson effects, yet suitable material platforms remain limited. Here we report Josephson junctions based on epitaxial Al/InAs/(Ga,Fe)Sb heterostructures grown by low-temperature molecular beam epitaxy, achieving atomically abrupt superconductor/semiconductor/ferromagnetic interfaces. The devices exhibit clear proximity-induced superconductivity, including multiple Andreev reflections and gate-tunable supercurrents, confirming transparent coupling across the hybrid structure. Under perpendicular magnetic fields, the junctions reveal highly unconventional Fraunhofer interference patterns with hysteresis, flux jumps, asymmetric lobe evolution, and clear nonreciprocity, providing strong evidence of induced ferromagnetism and broken time-reversal symmetry in the superconducting channel. Gate control further modulates the critical current, highlighting the semiconducting nature of the system. Our results demonstrate that ferromagnetic semiconductor heterostructures can serve as a highly tunable platform for exploring proximity-induced superconductivity and superconducting diode effects, and for advancing device concepts at the intersection of magnetism and quantum electronics.

AI.tldr: 在Al/InAs/(Ga,Fe)Sb异质结中实现了超导-铁磁耦合，观察到非常规约瑟夫森效应和超导二极管效应
AI.motivation: 超导与铁磁的相互作用能产生非常规约瑟夫森效应，但合适的材料平台有限，需要寻找新的异质结构来实现这种耦合
AI.method: 采用低温分子束外延生长Al/InAs/(Ga,Fe)Sb异质结，实现原子级陡峭的超导/半导体/铁磁界面，制备约瑟夫森结器件
AI.result: 器件显示出邻近诱导超导性，包括多重安德烈夫反射和栅极可调超电流；在垂直磁场下观察到非常规夫琅禾费干涉图案，具有滞后、磁通跳跃、不对称瓣演化和明显非互易性
AI.conclusion: 铁磁半导体异质结可作为高度可调平台，用于探索邻近诱导超导性和超导二极管效应，推动磁性与量子电子学交叉领域的器件概念发展

title: Magnetically tunable telecom emission from Er3+ ions in layered WS2
summary: Erbium ions (Er3+) provide a telecom-band optical transition with strong magnetic-dipole character, making them attractive for quantum communication and spin-photon interfaces. Identifying host environments that combine low decoherence with photonic compatibility, however, remains a central challenge. Here we investigate Er3+ emission in tungsten disulfide (WS2) flakes, a layered host offering low nuclear-spin density and narrow telecom emission. Using time- and polarization-resolved photoluminescence under modest magnetic fields (< 0.2 T), we observe pronounced dimming, lifetime extension, and rotation of the emission dipole when the field has an out-of-plane component, whereas in-plane fields produce little change. Effective model calculations of Er3+ in monolayer WS2 parametrized from density functional theory indicate that these effects arise primarily from Zeeman-induced mixing of near-degenerate crystal-field sublevels, which modifies the magnitude and orientation of the optical transition dipole moments. Comparative measurements in flakes of different thickness and numerical estimates of the local density of optical states further suggest a secondary contribution from dipole coupling to the anisotropic photonic environment of thin WS2 layers. These findings identify layered WS2 as a platform where magnetic fields can tune telecom emission through an interplay of crystal-field physics and anisotropic photonic coupling.

AI.tldr: 在WS2薄片中，Er3+离子的电信波段发射可通过磁场调控，主要机制是Zeeman效应引起的晶体场亚能级混合，次要机制是各向异性光子环境耦合。
AI.motivation: 寻找兼具低退相干和光子兼容性的Er3+离子宿主环境是量子通信和自旋-光子接口的关键挑战。WS2作为低核自旋密度的层状材料具有潜力。
AI.method: 使用时间和偏振分辨的光致发光测量，在<0.2T磁场下观察Er3+在WS2薄片中的发射特性。结合基于密度泛函理论参数化的有效模型计算，分析晶体场亚能级混合效应。
AI.result: 观察到面外磁场引起发射明显变暗、寿命延长和发射偶极子旋转，而面内磁场变化很小。计算表明这主要源于Zeeman诱导的近简并晶体场亚能级混合，次要贡献来自各向异性光子环境耦合。
AI.conclusion: 层状WS2提供了一个平台，可通过磁场调控电信发射，这种调控源于晶体场物理和各向异性光子耦合的相互作用。

title: Luttinger's Theorem Violation and Green's Function Topological Invariants in a Fractional Chern Insulator
summary: Luttinger's theorem constrains the particle density of interacting fermions through global properties of the single-particle Green's function, and its violation signals a breakdown of the identification between the quantized Hall response and the Green-function-based Ishikawa-Matsuyama invariant. This phenomenon becomes especially compelling in strongly correlated topological phases, such as fractional Chern insulators, where fractionalized quasiparticles lack an adiabatic connection to electrons, raising the question of how Green's-function-based topological invariants manifest in such phases. Using exact diagonalization of the fermionic Harper-Hofstadter-Hubbard model, we compute bulk single-particle Green's functions deep inside a fractional Chern insulating phase and directly evaluate the Luttinger count, its possible correction (the Luttinger integral), and the Ishikawa-Matsuyama invariant $N_3[\mathrm{G}]$. We demonstrate a clear violation of Luttinger's theorem and show that the fractional nature of the many-body Chern number is encoded in the Středa response of the Luttinger integral, while the integer invariant $N_3[\mathrm{G}]$ arises from the Středa response of the Luttinger count. We also analytically prove that $N_3[\mathrm{G}]$ is fully determined by the Luttinger count together with the Chern number of the occupied Bloch band, upon neglecting Bloch-band mixing. Finally, we propose an experimental protocol to extract all Green-function-based topological invariants from local density-of-states measurements, experimentally accessible in fractional quantum Hall systems.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强关联拓扑相中Luttinger定理的违反现象，发现分数Chern绝缘体中的格林函数拓扑不变量与Luttinger计数和Chern数之间的关系，并提出了实验测量方案。
AI.motivation: 在强关联拓扑相（如分数Chern绝缘体）中，分数化准粒子与电子之间缺乏绝热连接，这引发了格林函数拓扑不变量如何在这些相中表现的问题。Luttinger定理的违反现象在强关联拓扑相中尤其引人关注。
AI.method: 使用精确对角化方法研究费米子Harper-Hofstadter-Hubbard模型，计算分数Chern绝缘相中的体单粒子格林函数，直接评估Luttinger计数、Luttinger积分修正和Ishikawa-Matsuyama不变量N3[G]。
AI.result: 明确展示了Luttinger定理的违反，发现多体Chern数的分数性质编码在Luttinger积分的Středa响应中，而整数不变量N3[G]来自Luttinger计数的Středa响应。在忽略Bloch带混合的情况下，N3[G]完全由Luttinger计数和占据Bloch带的Chern数决定。
AI.conclusion: 提出了从局域态密度测量中提取所有格林函数拓扑不变量的实验方案，这在分数量子霍尔系统中是可实验实现的。该研究为理解强关联拓扑相中的格林函数拓扑不变量提供了重要见解。

title: Resetting in a viscoelastic bath: the bath remembers
summary: We study stochastic resetting of a probe particle in a viscoelastic environment where only the probe is reset while the medium retains memory of its past dynamics. Using a minimal model with finite correlation time, we analyze the competition between the resetting timescale and the viscoelastic relaxation timescale. This interplay leads to nonequilibrium steady states that differ qualitatively from those of Markovian Brownian motion with resetting. In particular, strong memory effects produce stationary position distributions with non-exponential tails. For instantaneous resets, we derive the limiting steady-state distributions analytically and compute exactly the time dependent leading non-vanishing moments. We also investigate non-instantaneous resetting via constant-velocity return protocols. In contrast to overdamped Brownian motion, where steady-state fluctuations are independent of the return dynamics, we find that in a viscoelastic medium the fluctuations depend on the reset velocity. This protocol dependence arises from the finite memory of the environment and highlights the role of environmental correlations in resetting-induced steady states.

AI.tldr: 研究粘弹性环境中探针粒子的随机重置，其中只有探针被重置而介质保留其过去动力学的记忆。发现重置时间尺度与粘弹性弛豫时间尺度之间的竞争导致非平衡稳态，其性质与马尔可夫布朗运动的重置稳态有本质差异。
AI.motivation: 研究在具有记忆效应的粘弹性环境中进行随机重置时，环境记忆如何影响重置诱导的稳态性质。传统马尔可夫布朗运动的重置研究忽略了环境记忆效应，而实际生物物理系统（如细胞质）具有粘弹性特性，需要理解这种非马尔可夫环境对重置过程的影响。
AI.method: 采用具有有限相关时间的最小模型，分析重置时间尺度与粘弹性弛豫时间尺度之间的相互作用。对于瞬时重置，推导了极限稳态分布的解析解，并精确计算了时间相关的领先非零矩。对于非瞬时重置，研究了恒定速度返回协议。
AI.result: 发现强记忆效应产生具有非指数尾部的稳态位置分布。与过阻尼布朗运动（稳态涨落与返回动力学无关）不同，在粘弹性介质中，涨落依赖于重置速度。这种协议依赖性源于环境的有限记忆，突显了环境相关性在重置诱导稳态中的作用。
AI.conclusion: 粘弹性环境中的随机重置产生与马尔可夫系统本质不同的非平衡稳态。环境记忆效应导致稳态分布具有非指数尾部，且稳态性质依赖于重置协议的具体细节。这强调了在具有记忆的实际系统中研究重置过程时，必须考虑环境相关性。

title: From pore collapse to crystal growth: ultrafast laser-induced stishovite formation in nanoporous silica
summary: The crystallization of amorphous solids under ultrafast laser irradiation represents a paradigm of non-equilibrium phase transitions, where the interplay between electromagnetic energy localization and atomic-scale dynamics remains largely uncharted. By using a multiscale framework that couples Finite-Difference Time-Domain simulations of nonlinear light propagation with Molecular Dynamics of the atomic response, we demonstrate that field enhancement at nanopore interfaces confines laser energy and drives a rapid collapse of the surrounding matrix. In the silica structure containing a nanopore of 2 nm radius, corresponding to a porosity of approximately 7%, the enhanced local electromagnetic field led to a final equilibrium temperature 16% higher than for the 1-nm pore (1% porosity), and 20% higher than for the homogeneous medium. Particularly, the heterogeneous energy localization in the 2-nm-pore system created a preferential nucleation site within the dense glass network and led to the ultrafast formation of stishovite, a high-pressure crystalline phase of SiO2, on a sub-nanosecond timescale, significantly faster than in homogeneous silica at the same equilibrium temperature. Such accelerated crystallization enables the phase transition to outpace pressure relaxation, which would otherwise inhibit stishovite formation under identical thermal loading. These predictions align with experimental observations of laser-induced crystallization in confined geometries and establish nanopores as potent catalysts for controlling solid-state transformations via tailored electromagnetic hotspots.

AI.tldr: 通过多尺度模拟发现，纳米孔界面处的电磁场增强能局域激光能量，驱动周围基质快速塌陷，在亚纳秒时间尺度上形成高压相斯石英，比均匀介质快得多。
AI.motivation: 研究超快激光辐照下非晶固体的结晶过程，探索电磁能量局域化与原子尺度动力学之间的相互作用，这是非平衡相变的重要范例。
AI.method: 采用多尺度框架，将非线性光传播的有限差分时域模拟与原子响应的分子动力学模拟相结合，研究含纳米孔的二氧化硅结构。
AI.result: 2纳米孔径（约7%孔隙率）的局域电磁场增强使最终平衡温度比1纳米孔（1%孔隙率）高16%，比均匀介质高20%。在2纳米孔系统中，异质能量局域化在致密玻璃网络中创造了优先成核位点，导致在亚纳秒时间尺度上快速形成高压相斯石英，比相同平衡温度下的均匀二氧化硅快得多。
AI.conclusion: 纳米孔可作为通过定制电磁热点控制固态相变的有效催化剂，加速的结晶使相变能够超越压力弛豫，这在相同热载荷下通常会抑制斯石英的形成。这些预测与受限几何中激光诱导结晶的实验观察结果一致。

title: TENSO: Software Package for Numerically Exact Open Quantum Dynamics Based on Efficient Tree Tensor Network Decomposition of the Hierarchical Equations of Motion
summary: TENSO is a versatile and powerful open-source software package for numerically exact simulations of the dynamics of quantum systems immersed in structured thermal environments. It is based on a tree tensor network decomposition of the hierarchical equations of motion (HEOM) that efficiently curbs its curse of dimensionality with bath complexity. As such, TENSO enables exact non-Markovian open quantum dynamics simulations even with complex environments typical of chemistry and quantum information science. TENSO allows for time-dependent drive in the system, and for non-commuting fluctuations. More generally, TENSO efficiently propagates the dynamics for any method with a generator of the dynamics that can be expressed in a sum-of-products form, including the HEOM and multi-layer multiconfigurational time-dependent Hartree methods. TENSO enables simulations using tensor trees and trains of arbitrary order, and implements three propagation strategies for the coupled master equations; two fixed-rank methods that require a constant memory footprint during the dynamics and one adaptive rank method with a variable memory footprint controlled by the target level of computational error. In contrast to the accompanying theory and algorithmic paper [J. Chem. Phys. 163, 104109 (2025)] the focus here is on the practical usage and applications of TENSO with underlying theoretical concepts introduced only as needed.

AI.tldr: TENSO是一个开源软件包，用于精确模拟量子系统在结构化热环境中的动力学，基于树张量网络分解的层次运动方程，能高效处理复杂环境下的非马尔可夫开放量子动力学。
AI.motivation: 化学和量子信息科学中的复杂环境需要精确的非马尔可夫开放量子动力学模拟工具，传统方法面临维度灾难问题，需要开发高效数值方法。
AI.method: 基于树张量网络分解层次运动方程，采用张量树和链的任意阶模拟，实现三种传播策略：两种固定秩方法和一种自适应秩方法，支持含时驱动和非对易涨落。
AI.result: TENSO能够高效处理维度灾难，实现精确的非马尔可夫开放量子动力学模拟，适用于复杂环境，支持多种动力学生成器方法。
AI.conclusion: TENSO是一个功能强大且通用的开源软件包，为化学和量子信息科学中的复杂环境量子动力学模拟提供了高效精确的数值工具。

title: Rejection-free Glauber Monte Carlo for the 2D Random Field Ising Model via Hierarchical Probabilistic Counters
summary: We present an efficient Monte Carlo algorithm for the simulation of the two-dimensional Random Field Ising Model (RFIM). The method combines the event-driven, rejection-free character of the Bortz Kalos-Lebowitz (BKL) algorithm with Glauber transition probabilities, introducing hierarchical probabilistic counters to perform spin selection in O(log N) operations. This enables efficient sampling of the system's dynamics, especially in the low-temperature and low-disorder regime, where traditional Metropolis updates suffer from critical slowing down. Furthermore, this approach allows a proper dynamical simulation of the Ising system's behavior even in the presence of a Random Field (RF), unlike the BKL method. RFIM simulations with Gaussian field distributions reproduce the expected reduction of the pseudo-critical temperature with increasing disorder. Benchmarking shows speedups exceeding two orders of magnitude compared to the Metropolis algorithm in the low-temperature regime. The proposed method provides an efficient and dynamically faithful tool for studying both equilibrium and non-equilibrium phenomena in disordered spin systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效的二维随机场伊辛模型蒙特卡洛算法，结合BKL算法的事件驱动特性和Glauber跃迁概率，使用分层概率计数器实现O(log N)的自旋选择，在低温低无序区域相比Metropolis算法加速超过两个数量级。
AI.motivation: 传统Metropolis算法在低温低无序区域存在临界减速问题，而BKL算法无法正确处理随机场存在的情况，需要开发一种既能高效采样又能正确处理随机场影响的算法。
AI.method: 结合BKL算法的事件驱动、拒绝自由特性与Glauber跃迁概率，引入分层概率计数器实现自旋选择，算法复杂度为O(log N)，能够正确处理随机场存在下的系统动力学。
AI.result: 算法在低温区域相比Metropolis算法加速超过两个数量级，能够重现高斯场分布下伪临界温度随无序度增加而降低的预期行为，提供了研究无序自旋系统平衡和非平衡现象的高效工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为研究无序自旋系统的平衡和非平衡现象提供了一个高效且动力学忠实性的工具，特别适用于低温低无序区域，解决了传统算法的局限性。

title: $\textit{Ab initio}$ Identification of Hydrogen Tunneling as Two-Level Systems in Nb$_2$O$_5$ and Ta$_2$O$_5$
summary: Two-level systems (TLS) in native Nb and Ta oxides limit superconducting-qubit coherence and SRF-cavity quality factors in the microwave frequency range, yet their microscopic origin remains unclear. We combine MLIP-accelerated sampling of hydrogen configurations and diffusion pathways in amorphous Nb and Ta pentoxides with targeted $\textit{ab initio}$ validation. Hydrogen is the only light interstitial with barrier-distance combinations near the $\sim0.1-10$ GHz tunneling regime, and its ensemble statistics in amorphous oxides produce effective TLS densities and loss estimates consistent with the experimentally observed higher loss in Nb oxide than in Ta oxide. Our results point to H tunneling as a plausible microscopic TLS source in these materials.

AI.tldr: 氢原子隧穿可能是Nb和Ta氧化物中限制超导量子比特相干性的微观双能级系统来源
AI.motivation: Nb和Ta氧化物中的双能级系统限制了超导量子比特的相干时间和SRF腔的品质因子，但其微观起源尚不清楚，需要研究
AI.method: 结合MLIP加速的氢构型采样和扩散路径模拟，在非晶Nb和Ta五氧化物中进行靶向ab initio验证
AI.result: 氢是唯一具有~0.1-10 GHz隧穿频率的轻间隙原子，其统计分布产生的有效TLS密度和损耗估计与实验中观察到的Nb氧化物比Ta氧化物损耗更高一致
AI.conclusion: 氢原子隧穿可能是这些材料中双能级系统的微观来源

title: Spontaneous Polarization Suppression of Exciton-Exciton Annihilation in 3R-Stacked MoS$_2$ Bilayers
summary: Rapid exciton-exciton annihilation (EEA) in two-dimensional semiconductors limits access to high-density excitonic regimes essential for efficient optoelectronic operation under strong excitation. Here, we show that EEA is suppressed by repulsive dipole-dipole interactions between interlayer excitons polarized by the spontaneous polarization intrinsic to rhombohedral (3R)-stacked MoS$_2$ bilayers. Using ultrafast pump-probe spectroscopy, we measure an EEA rate of $γ_{\rm EEA}=(5.03\pm0.99)\times10^{-3}$ cm$^2$ s$^{-1}$ in 3R bilayers, which is approximately 18.2-fold smaller than that in monolayers and 2.9-fold smaller than that in nonpolar 2H bilayers. Despite the higher exciton diffusivity recently reported for 3R relative to 2H bilayers, the reduced EEA rate in 3R indicates a rate-limited regime governed by the close-encounter annihilation probability rather than diffusion. A rate-limited annihilation model incorporating a dipole-dipole repulsive potential captures the observed ratio $γ_{{\rm EEA},3{\rm R}}/γ_{{\rm EEA},2{\rm H}}\approx0.35$ for an exciton-exciton encounter distance of $\sim$1.3 nm, consistent with the bilayer exciton Bohr radius. These results show that spontaneous polarization in 3R-stacked bilayers suppresses nonlinear excitonic losses and provides a route toward high-density excitonics.

AI.tldr: 3R堆叠MoS₂双层中的自发极化通过偶极-偶极排斥作用抑制激子-激子湮灭，为高密度激子器件提供新途径
AI.motivation: 二维半导体中快速的激子-激子湮灭限制了高密度激子态的实现，影响强激发下的光电器件效率。研究旨在探索抑制EEA的新机制。
AI.method: 使用超快泵浦-探测光谱测量3R堆叠MoS₂双层中的EEA速率，并与单层和非极性2H双层进行比较。建立包含偶极-偶极排斥势的速率限制湮灭模型。
AI.result: 3R双层中的EEA速率比单层低18.2倍，比2H双层低2.9倍。偶极-偶极排斥作用将激子-激子相遇距离限制在约1.3nm，显著降低湮灭概率。
AI.conclusion: 3R堆叠双层中的自发极化通过偶极-偶极排斥有效抑制非线性激子损失，为实现高密度激子器件提供了新途径。

title: Field-direction sensitivity of Kondo hybridization in UTe$_2$
summary: Neutron scattering experiments on the spin-triplet superconductor UTe$_2$ have established that the dominant low-energy magnetic response is along Brillouin zone boundaries, resembling the magnetic susceptibility of narrow-gap interband excitations. We report a study of the sensitivity of these excitations to magnetic field along the crystallographic $\hat{a}$-axis. Up to fields of $μ_0 H$=13 T, the maximal inelastic neutron spectral weight increases in energy transfer, with a pronounced increase in $d\hbarω_{peak}/dH$ near $μ_0 H$=7 T. This behavior parallels the field and temperature dependent features of the electrical resistivity that are associated with Kondo hybridization. Our measurements suggest that $\hat{a}$-axis fields near $μ_0 H$=7~T induce a change in the hybridization between heavy $f$-electrons and the bare conduction band.

AI.tldr: UTe₂中沿布里渊区边界的主导低能磁响应在a轴磁场下表现出与近藤杂化相关的行为，磁场约7T时出现显著变化。
AI.motivation: 研究自旋三重态超导体UTe₂中低能磁激发对a轴磁场的敏感性，探索磁场如何影响f电子与传导带的杂化过程。
AI.method: 使用中子散射实验测量UTe₂在不同a轴磁场（最高13T）下的非弹性中子谱，分析谱权重随磁场的变化，并与电输运测量结果对比。
AI.result: 随着a轴磁场增加，非弹性中子谱权重向更高能量转移，在约7T附近dħω_peak/dH显著增加，这与电输运测量中与近藤杂化相关的特征行为一致。
AI.conclusion: a轴磁场约7T时诱导了重f电子与裸传导带之间杂化的变化，揭示了磁场调控近藤杂化过程的能力。

title: Accelerating Structure-Property Relationship Discovery with Multimodal Machine Learning and Self-Driving Microscopy
summary: Microscopy combined with local spectroscopy is widely used to correlate nanoscale structure with functional properties in materials, but conventional measurements rely heavily on human-selected sampling locations and predefined targets, limiting dataset diversity and the potential for discovery. Here, we present a framework that integrates autonomous microscopy with a dual-novelty deep kernel learning (DN-DKL) for adaptive data acquisition and a dual variational autoencoder (VAE) for representation learning. DN-DKL actively guides the microscopy toward structurally and spectroscopically novel regions, enabling efficient collection of large spectral datasets. Dual-VAE embeds local structure and spectroscopic responses into a shared latent manifold that serves as a structure-property relationship map. We applied this framework for the investigation of halide perovskite films using conductive atomic force microscopy. The results reveal distinct hysteresis behaviors that are linked to specific nanoscale structural motifs, including grain boundary junction points that show hysteresis under different bias conditions and asymmetric grain boundaries that suppress charge transport. This framework establishes a general strategy that leverages the complementary strengths of self-driving microscopy, machine learning, and human expertise to accelerate scientific discovery in functional materials.

AI.tldr: 提出结合自主显微镜、双新颖性深度核学习和双变分自编码器的框架，用于自适应数据采集和表征学习，应用于卤化物钙钛矿薄膜研究，揭示纳米尺度结构与电学性能的关联。
AI.motivation: 传统显微镜结合局部光谱测量依赖人工选择采样位置和预定义目标，限制了数据集的多样性和发现潜力，需要更高效的自适应数据采集和表征学习方法。
AI.method: 集成自主显微镜、双新颖性深度核学习（DN-DKL）用于自适应数据采集，以及双变分自编码器（VAE）用于表征学习，将局部结构和光谱响应嵌入共享潜在流形。
AI.result: 应用于卤化物钙钛矿薄膜的导电原子力显微镜研究，揭示了与特定纳米尺度结构相关的不同滞后行为，包括在不同偏压条件下显示滞后的晶界连接点，以及抑制电荷传输的不对称晶界。
AI.conclusion: 该框架建立了结合自主显微镜、机器学习和人类专业知识的通用策略，可加速功能材料的科学发现。

title: Interface-dependent Phase Transitions and Ultrafast Hydrogen Superionic Diffusion of H2O Ice
summary: High-pressure experiments using diamond anvils have revealed novel properties and phase behavior of H2O under extreme conditions. When contained in diamond-anvil cells, the H2O samples are usually in direct contact with the diamond anvil. However, the extent to which this interface affects measured pressure-induced properties and behavior, including coexistence lines of ice phases, remains unknown. Combining artificial neural network methods and active learning schemes with large-scale molecular dynamics simulations, we elucidate the interfacial effects on various properties of high-pressure ice phases, including superionic states, solid-solid phase transitions, and melting. The results reveal that the presence of this interface can significantly lower the hydrogen superionic transition temperature. Remarkably, the interface can also induce a spontaneous transition from bcc- to fcc-based ice following the inverse Bain mechanism. Further, we redefined a stability field of bcc and fcc ice below the melting line and predicted the existence of fcc ice at much lower pressures than previously thought. More broadly, the results emphasize the importance of interface effects in understanding a wide range of phenomena reported in experimental studies of ice under pressure, including inconsistencies between theoretical and experimental results of this fundamental system.

AI.tldr: 钻石砧界面显著影响高压冰相性质，降低超离子转变温度，诱导冰相自发转变，并重新定义冰相稳定场
AI.motivation: 高压实验中H2O样品通常直接接触金刚石砧，但界面效应对测量性质（包括冰相共存线）的影响尚不清楚，这可能导致理论与实验结果的不一致
AI.method: 结合人工神经网络方法和主动学习方案，进行大规模分子动力学模拟，研究界面效应对高压冰相性质的影响
AI.result: 界面显著降低氢超离子转变温度；诱导bcc到fcc冰的自发转变（逆贝恩机制）；重新定义bcc和fcc冰的稳定场，预测fcc冰在更低压力下存在
AI.conclusion: 界面效应在理解高压冰实验现象中至关重要，有助于解释理论与实验结果的不一致，对高压实验研究具有广泛意义

title: Crossover effects on the phase transitions phenomena translated by arborecences and spectral properties
summary: This study investigates how visibility graphs constructed from Monte Carlo Markov Chain time series of spin models capture the critical behavior of the system. More precisely, we show that this approach identifies continuous phase transitions as well as important nuances, such as crossover effects occurring in the transition from a critical line to a first-order line through a tricritical point, as observed, for example, in the Blume--Emery--Griffiths model or, in a simpler setting, in the Blume--Capel model. By applying Kirchhoff's theorem, we show that the number of spanning trees of the resulting graphs serves as a sensitive indicator of these phase transitions. Furthermore, a qualitative analysis of the adjacency matrices based on random matrix theory provides additional evidence for these phenomena. The methodology developed here can potentially be extended to the analysis of criticality in empirical time series from complex systems, such as climate, financial, and epidemiological data, where the Hamiltonian governing the dynamics is not necessarily known.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过从自旋模型的蒙特卡洛马尔可夫链时间序列构建可见性图，探索其如何捕捉系统的临界行为，发现生成图的生成树数量可作为相变敏感指标。
AI.motivation: 研究动机在于开发一种能够识别复杂系统中相变的方法，特别是当系统的哈密顿量未知时。传统方法通常需要了解系统的物理模型，而该方法旨在通过时间序列分析来检测临界行为，适用于气候、金融、流行病学等实际复杂系统。
AI.method: 方法包括：1）从自旋模型的蒙特卡洛马尔可夫链时间序列构建可见性图；2）应用基尔霍夫定理计算生成图的生成树数量；3）基于随机矩阵理论对邻接矩阵进行定性分析。该方法在Blume-Emery-Griffiths模型和Blume-Capel模型等自旋模型上进行验证。
AI.result: 结果显示：1）可见性图方法能够识别连续相变；2）能够检测到从临界线到一阶线通过三临界点的交叉效应等细微差别；3）生成树数量是这些相变的敏感指标；4）随机矩阵理论分析为这些现象提供了额外证据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功地将可见性图与基尔霍夫定理结合，为检测相变提供了有效工具。该方法具有扩展到分析经验时间序列的潜力，适用于哈密顿量未知的复杂系统，如气候、金融和流行病学数据。

title: A Dayem Loop Qubit Based on Interfering Superconducting Nanowires
summary: We propose a qubit design based on two parallel superconducting nanowires (i.e., a "Dayem loop qubit"). The inclusion of two nanowires instead of one leads to the Little-Parks effect, which provides an oscillator behavior for the qubit frequency as well as anharmonicity. Our key result is that even if the nanowires have an increasingly linear CPR at low supercurrents, the quantum interference between two condensates, induced by a magnetic field, leads to a restoration of cubic nonlinearity, which is predicted to be sufficient to create a functional transmon qubit based on thin superconducting wires. We consider both generic (cubic) current-phase relationships (CPR) as well as more realistic microscopic CPR, having higher-order nonlinearities. For higher-order CPRs, we propose a simple power-law phenomenological approximation valid at very low temperatures, at which superconducting qubits normally operate.

AI.tldr: 提出基于两条平行超导纳米线（Dayem环量子比特）的设计，通过Little-Parks效应实现量子比特频率的振荡行为和非谐性，即使纳米线在低超电流下具有线性电流-相位关系，量子干涉也能恢复立方非线性，足以构建基于细超导线的transmon量子比特。
AI.motivation: 传统超导量子比特通常使用Josephson结，但本文探索基于细超导线的替代方案。Dayem环（单纳米线）量子比特面临非线性不足的问题，特别是在低超电流下电流-相位关系趋于线性，这限制了其作为transmon量子比特的适用性。
AI.method: 采用两条平行超导纳米线构成Dayem环量子比特，利用Little-Parks效应（磁通量子化引起的超导序参数振荡）。分析包括：1）通用立方电流-相位关系；2）更现实的微观电流-相位关系（具有高阶非线性）；3）为高阶电流-相位关系提出在极低温度下的幂律唯象近似。
AI.result: 关键发现：即使纳米线在低超电流下具有线性电流-相位关系，两条凝聚体之间的量子干涉（由磁场诱导）能够恢复立方非线性。这种恢复的非线性足以构建功能性的transmon量子比特。Little-Parks效应同时提供了量子比特频率的振荡行为和非谐性。
AI.conclusion: 基于两条平行超导纳米线的Dayem环量子比特设计是可行的，通过量子干涉效应可以克服单纳米线非线性不足的问题，为构建基于细超导线的transmon量子比特提供了新途径。该设计在极低温度下（超导量子比特工作温度）具有实际应用潜力。

title: Phonon circular birefringence and polarization-filter in Magnetic Topological Insulators
summary: The surface phonon Hall viscosity (PHV)-an acoustic analog of axion electrodynamics-emerges from the strain response of magnetic topological insulators and gives rise to novel acoustic phenomena. In this work, we propose a previously unexplored effect: a phonon polarization-filter mechanism induced by the surface PHV, which generates an interface phonon mode with its frequency below the bulk mode frequency. This interface mode possesses a specific circular polarization and therefore acts as a polarization filter, confining only phonons with the matching polarization at the interface. Magnetic topological insulators can thus selectively transmit one type of circularly polarized phonon mode, enabling the manipulation of phonon polarization and angular momentum. In addition, we further develop a generalized scattering framework to study the effect of an injected acoustic wave from a trivial insulator to a magnetic topological insulator with both normal and oblique incidence, and discuss the phenomena of surface acoustic Faraday rotation and longitudinal-transverse mode conversion. Our results establish surface Hall viscosity as a powerful mechanism for engineering axial phonon states and open new avenues for topological phononic devices based on phonon angular momentum.

AI.tldr: 表面声子霍尔黏度诱导界面声子极化滤波机制，使磁拓扑绝缘体能够选择性传输特定圆偏振声子模式，实现声子极化和角动量操控。
AI.motivation: 探索表面声子霍尔黏度（PHV）这一磁拓扑绝缘体中的声学类似轴子电动力学现象，研究其如何产生新的声学效应，特别是声子极化滤波机制。
AI.method: 提出表面PHV诱导的界面声子模式，该模式具有特定圆偏振特性；建立广义散射框架，研究从普通绝缘体到磁拓扑绝缘体的声波注入（包括正入射和斜入射）。
AI.result: 发现界面声子模式频率低于体模式频率，具有特定圆偏振，可作为极化滤波器；观察到表面声学法拉第旋转和纵-横模式转换现象。
AI.conclusion: 表面霍尔黏度是工程化轴向声子态的强大机制，为基于声子角动量的拓扑声子器件开辟了新途径。

title: Magnetic-field tuning of the spin dynamics in the quasi-2D van der Waals antiferromagnet CuCrP$_{2}$S$_{6}$
summary: The use of antiferromagnets in magnetoelectronic devices as counterparts of ferromagnets is a new, rapidly developing trend in spintronics that leverages antiferromagnetic (AFM) magnons for transmitting of spin currents. Van der Waals (vdW) antiferromagnets are particularly attractive in this respect as they possess tunable magnetic properties and can be easily integrated into spintronic devices. In this work we use electron spin resonance (ESR) spectroscopy to assess the potential of the vdW AFM compound CuCrP$_{2}$S$_{6}$ for magnonic applications by exploring the magnetic field ($H$) dependence of the spectrum of magnon excitations below its AFM ordering temperature $T_{\rm N} \approx 30$ K and the correlated spin dynamics above $T_{\rm N}$. ESR reveals prominent ferromagnetic (FM) spin correlations that persist far above $T_{\rm N}$ suggesting an intrinsically two-dimensional character of the spin dynamics in CuCrP$_{2}$S$_{6}$. Most interestingly, at $T < T_{\rm N}$, CuCrP$_{2}$S$_{6}$ features two non-degenerate, i.e., distinct in energy AFM magnon modes at $H = 0$ which can be tuned to the FM type of collective spin excitations with increasing $H$. These remarkable properties are favorable for the induction and control of unidirectional spin current in CuCrP$_{2}$S$_{6}$ and suggest it as a new functional material for magnetoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过电子自旋共振(ESR)光谱研究了范德华反铁磁体CuCrP₂S₆的磁振子激发特性，发现其在低于奈尔温度时具有两种非简并反铁磁磁振子模式，可通过磁场调控为铁磁型集体自旋激发，适合自旋电流诱导与控制。
AI.motivation: 反铁磁体在磁电子器件中作为铁磁体的对应物具有重要应用潜力，特别是范德华反铁磁体因其可调磁性和易于集成而备受关注。本研究旨在评估CuCrP₂S₆在磁振子应用中的潜力。
AI.method: 使用电子自旋共振(ESR)光谱技术，在低于奈尔温度(T_N≈30K)时研究磁振子激发谱的磁场依赖性，以及在T_N以上研究相关自旋动力学。
AI.result: ESR显示CuCrP₂S₆在远高于T_N时仍存在显著的铁磁自旋关联，表明其自旋动力学具有内在二维特性。在T<T_N时，材料在零磁场下具有两种非简并反铁磁磁振子模式，随磁场增加可调控为铁磁型集体自旋激发。
AI.conclusion: CuCrP₂S₆的这些显著特性有利于诱导和控制单向自旋电流，表明它是一种适用于磁电子学的新型功能材料。

title: Engineering Quantum Phases in Two Dimensions via Vacancy-Induced Electronic Reconstruction
summary: Topological phases of matter are commonly understood as emerging either from crystalline symmetry and intrinsic spin-orbit coupling or from disorder-driven electronic renormalization. In realistic materials, however, structural defects naturally combine both ingredients. Here, we demonstrate a general and material-independent mechanism by which atomic vacancies can induce topological phase transitions in two-dimensional semiconductors that are otherwise topologically trivial. Vacancies generate locally ordered dangling-bond states governed by well-defined hopping and spin-orbit interactions, while their spatial distribution and mutual coupling introduce long-range disorder. As vacancy concentration increases, the hybridization of these defect states forms an emergent electronic subspace that undergoes a topological transition. Using a tight-binding framework supported by large-scale density functional theory calculations, we show that this vacancy-induced electronic reconstruction can robustly stabilize quantum spin Hall, quantum anomalous Hall, and Weyl semimetal phases, depending on symmetry breaking and spin polarization. Our results establish vacancies not merely as perturbations, but as active design elements capable of transforming trivial insulators into topological quantum matter, opening realistic routes for defect-engineered topological devices.

AI.tldr: 原子空位缺陷可将二维半导体从拓扑平庸转变为拓扑非平庸相，包括量子自旋霍尔、量子反常霍尔和外尔半金属相
AI.motivation: 现实材料中结构缺陷同时包含晶体对称性和无序驱动的电子重整化，但空位缺陷如何诱导拓扑相变尚不清楚。研究旨在揭示空位作为主动设计元素而非扰动的潜力
AI.method: 采用紧束缚模型框架，结合大规模密度泛函理论计算，研究空位产生的局域悬挂键态及其长程无序耦合
AI.result: 空位浓度增加时，缺陷态杂化形成涌现电子子空间，可发生拓扑相变。空位可稳定量子自旋霍尔、量子反常霍尔和外尔半金属相，取决于对称性破缺和自旋极化
AI.conclusion: 空位不仅是扰动，而是能将平庸绝缘体转变为拓扑量子物质的主动设计元素，为缺陷工程拓扑器件开辟现实途径

title: Mechanistic Insights into Enhanced Alkaline Oxygen Evolution on Zn-Al Alloy Electrodes
summary: Electrochemical water electrolysis, which produces clean energy carriers to mitigate carbon emissions, lacks suitable, low-cost electrodes for efficient oxygen evolution reaction (OER) in alkaline water splitting. To address this challenge, we developed Zn-Al alloy electrodes with varying Al contents up to 20 wt.% via powder metallurgy method and conducted electrochemical measurements of the OER in alkaline solution to investigate their catalytic performance. We also performed first-principles calculations to examine their thermodynamic phase stability and electronic structures. Both theoretical and experimental results indicated that incorporating $\geq 20$ wt.% Al into Zn led to thermodynamic phase instability and secondary-phase segregation in Al-rich regions, limiting reaction kinetics and reducing catalytic efficiency. Although the Al content of 5 wt.% into Zn exhibited favorable thermodynamic and electronic characteristics, but its electrochemical performance was inefficient and poor due to inadequate reaction active sites on the surface. In contrast, the 10 wt.% and 15 wt.% Al into Zn showed approximately three- and two-fold increases in anodic exchange current density relative to pure Zn, respectively. Additionally, the anodic overpotential losses ($η_{0,a}$) measured at a current density of 12 mAcm$^{-2}$ were 0.240 V for Zn$_{0.9}$Al$_{0.1}$ and 0.5603 V for Zn$_{0.85}$Al$_{0.15}$, significantly lower than that of pure Zn ($η_{0,a} = 1.086$ V). While Zn$_{0.9}$Al$_{0.1}$ and Zn$_{0.85}$Al$_{0.15}$ showed similar charge transfer resistance ($R_{\rm CT}$), Zn$_{0.9}$Al$_{0.1}$ demonstrated superior reaction kinetics and lower $η_{0,a}$ across all samples tested. Furthermore, the improved kinetics and reduced overpotential of the Zn-Al alloys favorably compare with those of other transition-metal-based catalysts, including Fe-Co-Ni-Mo alloys and Fe-doped CuO.

AI.tldr: 研究开发了不同铝含量的锌铝合金电极用于碱性水电解的析氧反应，发现10-15 wt.%铝含量具有最佳催化性能，过电位显著降低，反应动力学改善。
AI.motivation: 碱性水电解缺乏低成本高效的析氧反应电极，需要开发替代材料以促进清洁能源生产和碳减排。
AI.method: 采用粉末冶金法制备不同铝含量（最高20 wt.%）的锌铝合金电极，通过电化学测试评估析氧反应性能，并结合第一性原理计算分析热力学相稳定性和电子结构。
AI.result: 铝含量≥20 wt.%时出现热力学不稳定和相分离，5 wt.%铝含量虽热力学稳定但活性位点不足，10 wt.%和15 wt.%铝含量表现出最佳性能：交换电流密度分别提高约3倍和2倍，过电位显著降低（Zn0.9Al0.1为0.240 V，纯锌为1.086 V）。
AI.conclusion: 锌铝合金电极中10 wt.%铝含量具有最优的析氧反应性能，其反应动力学和过电位优于其他过渡金属基催化剂，为碱性水电解提供了有前景的低成本电极材料。

title: Field-angle dependence of magnetoresistance in UTe2
summary: We theoretically study angle-resolved magnetoresistance under rotated magnetic field in the normal state of a spin-triplet superconductor UTe$_2$. The Wannier model derived from a GGA+$U$ calculation shows quasi-two-dimensional Fermi surfaces with warping in the $k_z$ direction, consistent with quantum oscillation measurements in the high magnetic field regime. Solving the semiclassical Boltzmann equation, we show that the Fermi surface geometry gives rise to oscillations in the magnetoresistance when the field is tilted from the $c$ axis toward the $a$ or $b$ axis. By assuming a band-dependent relaxation time, the calculated angle-resolved magnetoresistance is in good agreement with the recent transport experiment. This is direct evidence for the warped Fermi surface revealed by ordinary intraband transport. It suggests that the hole band with long relaxation time dominates electron transport. The field angle dependence of the Hall resistivity is calculated for further experimental verification.

AI.tldr: 该理论研究UTe₂自旋三重态超导体正常态下磁场旋转时的角分辨磁阻，发现扭曲的费米面几何结构导致磁阻振荡，与实验一致。
AI.motivation: 研究UTe₂自旋三重态超导体正常态下的角分辨磁阻行为，理解其费米面几何结构对输运性质的影响，并与实验观测进行对比验证。
AI.method: 采用GGA+U计算推导Wannier模型，获得准二维扭曲费米面；求解半经典玻尔兹曼方程，计算角分辨磁阻；假设能带依赖的弛豫时间，与实验数据对比。
AI.result: 计算显示当磁场从c轴向a或b轴倾斜时，费米面几何结构导致磁阻振荡；计算结果与最近输运实验吻合良好；表明具有长弛豫时间的空穴带主导电子输运。
AI.conclusion: 角分辨磁阻直接揭示了扭曲费米面结构，为普通带内输运提供了证据；建议进一步实验验证霍尔电阻率的磁场角度依赖性。

title: Symmetry-Enforced Nodal $f$-Wave Magnets
summary: Owing to their relevance for spintronics, electronic band splitting and spin-polarization textures in magnets are active areas of research. In non-collinear magnets, alternating spin textures can arise both for isolated bands and for intersecting band pairs with nodal splitting. This raises the question of whether $p,f,...$-wave magnets should be defined by their spin polarization or their band splitting. To resolve this ambiguity, we introduce spin-space symmetries that couple the spin polarization and splitting textures for all bands. Focusing on the nodal $f$-wave magnet, we construct a tight-binding model of itinerant electrons on a honeycomb bilayer coupled to a non-collinear magnetic texture. Analytic expressions for spin polarization and splitting reveal the dependence on hopping and exchange coupling. We predict a canting-induced spin conductivity arising from the nodal structure of the splitting. Furthermore, the $f$-wave magnet in the bulk can induce $p$-wave magnetism on the surface. This surface $p$-wave character leads to a bulk-forbidden Edelstein effect with $f$-wave anisotropy.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了非共线磁体中的电子能带劈裂和自旋极化纹理，提出了自旋空间对称性来统一描述自旋极化和能带劈裂纹理，并预测了由节点结构引起的倾斜诱导自旋电导率。
AI.motivation: 由于自旋电子学的应用需求，磁体中的电子能带劈裂和自旋极化纹理成为研究热点。在非共线磁体中，交替的自旋纹理既可能出现在孤立能带中，也可能出现在具有节点劈裂的相交能带对中。这引发了一个问题：p波、f波等磁体应该根据其自旋极化还是能带劈裂来定义？为了解决这一模糊性，需要引入新的理论框架。
AI.method: 引入了自旋空间对称性，将自旋极化和劈裂纹理耦合到所有能带中。针对节点f波磁体，构建了一个紧束缚模型，描述蜂窝双层结构上的巡游电子与非共线磁纹理的耦合。通过解析表达式分析了自旋极化和劈裂对跳跃和交换耦合的依赖关系。
AI.result: 预测了由节点劈裂结构引起的倾斜诱导自旋电导率。发现体f波磁体可以在表面诱导出p波磁性，这种表面p波特性导致了具有f波各向异性的体禁戒Edelstein效应。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入自旋空间对称性，解决了非共线磁体中自旋极化和能带劈裂定义的模糊性问题。研究揭示了节点f波磁体的独特性质，包括倾斜诱导自旋电导和表面诱导p波磁性，为自旋电子学应用提供了新的理论见解。

title: Generalized symmetry-protected topological phases in mixed states from gauging dualities
summary: Decoherence in realistic quantum platforms motivates a mixed-state notion of topological phases of matter, including average symmetry-protected topological (ASPT) phases. Alongside this progress, generalized symmetries--notably noninvertible and dipole symmetries--have become powerful organizing principles for exotic quantum phases, yet their implications for mixed states remain less explored. In this work, we bridge these directions through a gauging correspondence between mixed-state phases with generalized symmetries and mixed-state phases with ordinary group symmetries, recasting the classification of noninvertible and dipole ASPT phases into familiar classifications of symmetry breaking and ASPT phases with dual symmetries. Using this approach, we classify and construct a subclass of ASPT phases with non-invertible and dipole symmetries in $(1+1)d$, including phases that are intrinsic to mixed states, and characterize them via string order parameters and protected edge modes.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过规范对应关系，将具有广义对称性（非可逆对称性和偶极对称性）的混合态拓扑相分类问题，转化为具有普通群对称性的混合态相分类问题，从而系统分类和构造了(1+1)维混合态中的非可逆对称性和偶极对称性ASPT相。
AI.motivation: 量子平台中的退相干现象促使人们研究混合态的拓扑相，包括平均对称性保护拓扑(ASPT)相。同时，广义对称性（特别是非可逆对称性和偶极对称性）已成为组织奇异量子相的有力工具，但这些对称性在混合态中的含义尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 通过建立规范对应关系，将具有广义对称性的混合态相与具有普通群对称性的混合态相联系起来，从而将非可逆对称性和偶极对称性ASPT相的分类问题转化为具有对偶对称性的对称破缺相和ASPT相的分类问题。
AI.result: 成功分类和构造了(1+1)维混合态中的非可逆对称性和偶极对称性ASPT相，包括那些本质上是混合态特有的相，并通过弦序参数和受保护的边缘模式来表征这些相。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过规范对应关系，将广义对称性在混合态中的研究纳入到更熟悉的对称破缺和ASPT相分类框架中，为理解混合态中的广义对称性拓扑相提供了系统方法。

title: Information-Geometric Signatures from Nonextensivity in the $1$-D Blume-Capel Model
summary: We study the thermodynamic geometry of the one-dimensional Blume--Capel model within the Tsallis nonextensive framework to understand how generalized statistics modify correlation structure and pseudo-critical behaviour. Using the transfer matrix method, we construct the Tsallis entropy based thermodynamic metric as its negative Hessian on the parameter space $(β, J)$, with the crystal-field anisotropy $D$ as a control parameter, and compute the associated scalar curvature $R(T)$ as a measure of correlations. Although no true phase transition occurs in one dimension, $R(T)$ exhibits finite peaks signaling pseudo-critical crossovers. We analyze both $D < J$ and $D > J$ regimes and show that deviations from the Boltzmann--Gibbs limit ($q=1$) systematically deform the curvature profile: for $q>1$ the peak shifts and correlations persist beyond the crossover, whereas for $q<1$ the peak is weakened or suppressed. Our results demonstrate that the Tsallis parameter $q$ geometrically reshapes the entropy surface, providing a clear information-geometric interpretation of nonextensive effects in spin-1 systems.

AI.tldr: 研究一维Blume-Capel模型在Tsallis非广延框架下的热力学几何，分析广义统计如何修正关联结构和伪临界行为。
AI.motivation: 探索Tsallis非广延统计如何通过几何方法影响自旋系统的关联结构和临界行为，为理解广义统计在统计物理中的作用提供几何视角。
AI.method: 使用转移矩阵方法，在参数空间(β,J)上构建基于Tsallis熵的热力学度量（作为熵的负Hessian矩阵），计算标量曲率R(T)作为关联度量，分析不同晶体场各向异性D和Tsallis参数q的影响。
AI.result: R(T)在伪临界交叉处出现有限峰值；q>1时峰值移动且关联在交叉后持续存在，q<1时峰值减弱或抑制；Tsallis参数q几何地重塑熵表面。
AI.conclusion: Tsallis参数q系统地改变曲率分布，为自旋-1系统中的非广延效应提供了清晰的信息几何解释，展示了广义统计如何几何地修正热力学行为。

title: Spin crossover in FeO under shock compression
summary: FeO (wüstite), which exhibits complex electronic and structural properties with increasing pressure and temperature, is a key mineralogical phase for understanding deep planetary interiors. However, direct measurements of its spin state at high-pressure and temperature remain challenging in static compression experiments. Here, we employ laser-driven shock compression to extend the FeO principal Hugoniot up to $\sim$900 GPa and perform in situ X-ray diffraction and X-ray emission spectroscopy up to 250 GPa, probing FeO's crystal structure and spin state. We demonstrate a continuous spin crossover of iron in FeO over a broad pressure range, with the high-spin state persisting beyond Earth's core-mantle boundary (CMB) conditions. These observations provide new experimental constraints on iron spin state at extreme conditions essential for geophysical models of (exo)planetary interiors.

AI.tldr: FeO在高压高温下的自旋状态研究：通过激光驱动冲击压缩将FeO主Hugoniot扩展到~900 GPa，结合原位X射线衍射和发射光谱，揭示了铁在FeO中的连续自旋交叉，高自旋态在地球核幔边界条件下持续存在。
AI.motivation: FeO（方铁矿）是理解深部行星内部的关键矿物相，但在静态压缩实验中直接测量其高压高温下的自旋状态具有挑战性。需要新的实验方法来约束极端条件下铁的自旋状态，这对地球物理模型至关重要。
AI.method: 采用激光驱动冲击压缩技术，将FeO主Hugoniot扩展到约900 GPa，同时进行原位X射线衍射和X射线发射光谱测量（最高达250 GPa），以探测FeO的晶体结构和自旋状态。
AI.result: 实验表明铁在FeO中在较宽压力范围内存在连续自旋交叉，高自旋态在地球核幔边界条件下仍然持续存在。这些观测为极端条件下铁的自旋状态提供了新的实验约束。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解（系外）行星内部的地球物理模型提供了关键实验数据，表明FeO中铁的高自旋态在深部行星条件下可能持续存在，这对行星内部结构和演化模型具有重要意义。

title: Magneto-rotation coupling dominates surface acoustic wave driven ferromagnetic resonance in the longitudinal geometry
summary: We present a phonon-magnon extension for the mumax+ micromagnetic framework that implements three surface acoustic wave (SAW) coupling mechanisms: magnetoelastic strain coupling, magneto-rotation coupling arising from the antisymmetric displacement gradient, and spin-rotation (Barnett) coupling from the lattice angular velocity. Six benchmark simulations validate the implementation through SAW-driven domain-wall motion, magnetization switching, magneto-rotation and Barnett field validation, nonreciprocal SAW-magnon absorption from Rayleigh-wave chirality, and spatially resolved coupling in a standing SAW cavity. For the longitudinal geometry (m_0 parallel to k_SAW), we show that the magnetoelastic coupling produces zero transverse torque despite generating a 50 times larger effective field; the magneto-rotation channel provides the sole driving mechanism. The crossover angle below which MR dominates is theta_c approximately 1.1 degrees for YIG parameters. Treating the magneto-rotation coupling constant K_mr as a tunable parameter, we map out the cooperativity phase diagram and show that MR alone can achieve strong coupling (C = 257 for K_mr = 1 MJ/m^3) with an avoided-crossing splitting of 13.6 MHz.

AI.tldr: 该论文在mumax+微磁框架中实现了声表面波-磁振子耦合的扩展，包含三种耦合机制：磁弹性应变耦合、磁旋转耦合和自旋旋转耦合，并通过六个基准模拟验证了实现。
AI.motivation: 研究声表面波与磁振子之间的耦合机制，特别是磁旋转耦合在声表面波驱动磁化动力学中的关键作用，这对于开发基于声波-自旋相互作用的器件具有重要意义。
AI.method: 在mumax+微磁框架中扩展了声表面波-磁振子耦合模块，实现了三种耦合机制：磁弹性应变耦合、磁旋转耦合（来自反对称位移梯度）和自旋旋转（Barnett）耦合（来自晶格角速度）。通过六个基准模拟验证实现。
AI.result: 在纵向几何结构中，磁弹性耦合产生零横向扭矩，而磁旋转耦合是唯一的驱动机制；交叉角θ_c≈1.1度；通过调节磁旋转耦合常数K_mr，可以实现强耦合（C=257，K_mr=1 MJ/m³），避免交叉分裂达13.6 MHz。
AI.conclusion: 磁旋转耦合在声表面波驱动磁化动力学中起着关键作用，特别是在小角度下占主导地位；通过调节耦合参数可以实现强耦合，为声波-自旋相互作用器件设计提供了重要指导。

title: Extended Hubbard model on fractals: d-Wave superconductivity and competing pairing channels
summary: Fractal structures such as the Sierpiński gasket have been predicted to enhance the critical tem- perature of s-wave superconductivity compared to regular crystals while maintaining macroscopic phase coherence of Cooper pairs. Here we extend this analysis to order parameters with non-trivial symmetry by studying the extended Hubbard model with nearest-neighbor attraction on fractal lattices. Using Bogoliubov-de Gennes mean-field theory, we find that the Sierpiński carpet dramat- ically alters the competition between pairing channels: the predominant d-wave superconducting dome at half filling of the square lattice becomes unstable for the carpet, while at high and low fillings extended s-wave pairing gets strongly enhanced. We attribute this to geometric frustration of sign-changing order parameters by the fractal boundary structure. On the triangular Sierpiński gasket, hybrid s+d+id states show critical temperature enhancement comparable to that previously observed for pure s-wave pairing. Our results demonstrate that fractal geometry acts as a selective filter for pairing symmetries, with the compatibility between order parameter structure and lattice topology determining which channels are stabilized or suppressed.

AI.tldr: 分形几何（如谢尔宾斯基地毯）能选择性增强或抑制不同对称性的超导配对通道，改变超导竞争格局。
AI.motivation: 研究分形结构如何影响非平凡对称性超导序参数，探索几何拓扑对配对通道的选择性调控作用。
AI.method: 使用Bogoliubov-de Gennes平均场理论，研究扩展哈伯德模型在分形晶格（谢尔宾斯基地毯和三角谢尔宾斯基垫片）上的最近邻吸引相互作用。
AI.result: 谢尔宾斯基地毯显著改变配对通道竞争：方形晶格半填充时的d波超导穹顶变得不稳定，而在高填充和低填充时扩展s波配对显著增强；三角谢尔宾斯基垫片上混合s+d+id态显示出与纯s波配对相当的临界温度增强。
AI.conclusion: 分形几何作为配对对称性的选择性过滤器，序参数结构与晶格拓扑的兼容性决定了哪些通道被稳定或抑制。

title: Polarization-Aligned, Spectrally Consistent Quantum Emitters in As-Exfoliated Carbon-Doped Hexagonal Boron Nitride
summary: Solid-state quantum emitters constitute an essential building blocks of integrated quantum photonic circuits. Among potential emitter platforms, hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) hosts single-photon emitters in an atomically thin lattice amenable to photonic integration. However, multi-step fabrication approaches, limited defect specificity, and poor emission wavelength repeatability limit the performance of hBN quantum light sources relative to established solid-state architectures. Developing methods to induce emitters that are both suitable for planar photonic devices and that exhibit consistent optical properties remains a key objective. In this work, we identify quantum emitters in as-exfoliated carbon-doped hBN that exhibit both stable and repeatable emission energies together with polarization-aligned dipoles. Owing to the high lattice crystallinity, these single-photon light sources demonstrate exceptional spectral stability with a standard deviation of 7 $μ$eV. The emission energy is reproducible and confined within a narrow range of 2.2825 ${\pm}$ 0.0042 eV. Notably, consistent dipole alignment for absorption and emission polarization suggests that the intrinsic defects are of the same nature. The color centers are observed in as-exfoliated hBN without any post-treatment, significantly facilitating further interfacing with planar photonic structures. These reproducible, polarization-aligned quantum emitters in as-exfoliated hBN provide a versatile platform for scalable integration, offering a pathway toward a broad range of quantum technologies.

AI.tldr: 在碳掺杂六方氮化硼中发现了具有稳定可重复发射能量和偏振对齐偶极子的量子发射器，无需后处理即可直接用于平面光子器件集成。
AI.motivation: 六方氮化硼作为量子发射器平台具有原子级薄晶格优势，但传统方法存在制造步骤多、缺陷特异性有限、发射波长重复性差等问题，限制了其在集成量子光子电路中的应用。需要开发能够产生适合平面光子器件且具有一致光学特性的发射器的方法。
AI.method: 使用碳掺杂的六方氮化硼，在剥离后无需任何后处理的情况下直接观察量子发射器。通过高晶格结晶度实现稳定的光谱特性，测量发射能量的可重复性和偶极子偏振对齐情况。
AI.result: 发现了具有优异光谱稳定性的单光子光源，标准偏差仅为7 μeV。发射能量可重复且集中在2.2825 ± 0.0042 eV的窄范围内。吸收和发射偏振的偶极子对齐一致，表明内在缺陷性质相同。这些发射器在剥离后即可观察到，便于与平面光子结构集成。
AI.conclusion: 碳掺杂六方氮化硼中可重复、偏振对齐的量子发射器为可扩展集成提供了多功能平台，为广泛的量子技术应用开辟了途径。

title: Novel Magnetoacoustic Resonance Technique for Exploring Hidden Quadrupoles in a Crystal Field Quartet
summary: Crystal field quartets with quadrupole degrees of freedom play a crucial role in hidden ordering systems, as exemplified by CeB$_6$. We present a novel magnetoacoustic resonance technique that combines acoustically induced strain fields with a linearly polarized high-frequency microwave field to probe quadrupoles inherent in the quartet hidden behind magnetic properties. This method offers the advantage of enabling quantum quadrupole resonance transitions for large excitation energy gaps within quartet sublevels under a strong magnetic field, which cannot be achieved by acoustic experiments alone. Formulating a simultaneous single-phonon-single-photon absorption transition process using Floquet theory, we demonstrate how the transition probabilities are affected by changing the propagation direction of a bulk acoustic wave. The key result is that distinct maxima in transition probabilities, attributed to specific propagation directions, indicate a characteristic of quadrupole physics and exhibit an abrupt change owing to an induced ordered moment. This photon-assisted magnetoacoustic resonance technique will promote a broader range of applications of acoustic experiments for the study of quadrupole physics.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合声波应变场与微波场的磁声共振技术，用于探测隐藏在磁性质背后的四重态中的四极矩，实现强磁场下大能隙的量子四极共振跃迁。
AI.motivation: 四重态晶体场中的四极矩自由度在隐藏有序系统中至关重要（如CeB6），但传统声学实验难以探测强磁场下四重态子能级间的大能隙跃迁。
AI.method: 开发新型磁声共振技术：结合声学诱导应变场与线偏振高频微波场，利用Floquet理论描述单声子-单光子协同吸收跃迁过程，通过改变体声波传播方向分析跃迁概率变化。
AI.result: 特定传播方向对应的跃迁概率出现明显极大值，这是四极矩物理的特征表现；当诱导有序矩出现时，这些极大值会发生突变，揭示了四极矩的有序转变。
AI.conclusion: 光子辅助磁声共振技术扩展了声学实验在四极矩物理研究中的应用范围，为探测隐藏在磁性质背后的四极矩提供了新手段。

title: Study of Meta-Fibonacci Integer Sequences by Continuous Self-Referential Functional Equations
summary: I propose and investigate the use of continuous functional equations for the study of meta-Fibonacci integer sequences. This exploratory study includes three sequences with quite different behavior: Conway's famous sequence $A(n)= A(A(n-1))+A(n-A(n-1))$, the sequence $D(n)= D(D(n-1))+D(n-1-D(n-2))$ introduced by the present author more than 25 years ago, and Hofstadter's well-known $Q(n)= Q(n-Q(n-1))+Q(n-Q(n-2))$. The sequences are studied in their equivalent detrended forms $(a,d,q)(n)=2\,(A,D,Q)(n)-n$. For $a(n)$ and $d(n)$, a highly symmetric functional equation admits exact continuous solutions that nicely model the global behavior (backbone) of the sequences. For the Hofstadter sequence, a continuous functional model is developed that leads to a random matrix approach for the generation and study of fractal solutions. Two remarkable properties of the Q-sequence are reproduced by the model: the anomalous scaling of the generation length, which scales $\sim (2-η)^k$, and the anomalous amplitude growth that scales like $2^{αk}$.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用连续函数方程研究元斐波那契整数序列，重点关注Conway序列、作者提出的D序列和Hofstadter的Q序列，通过去趋势变换建立连续模型来分析其全局行为。
AI.motivation: 研究元斐波那契序列的数学行为，特别是这些离散整数序列的全局模式和对称性，通过连续函数方程的方法来更好地理解这些复杂递归序列的本质特性。
AI.method: 将离散序列转换为去趋势形式(a,d,q)(n)=2(A,D,Q)(n)-n，为a(n)和d(n)建立高度对称的连续函数方程并求解精确连续解，为Q序列开发连续函数模型并采用随机矩阵方法研究分形解。
AI.result: 对于Conway序列和D序列，获得了精确的连续解，能够很好地模拟序列的全局行为（主干）；对于Hofstadter Q序列，连续模型成功再现了两个显著特性：生成长度的异常缩放（~ (2-η)^k）和振幅的异常增长（~ 2^{αk}）。
AI.conclusion: 连续函数方程方法为研究元斐波那契序列提供了有效的分析框架，能够揭示这些复杂递归序列的深层数学结构和对称性，特别是对于Hofstadter Q序列的分形特性提供了新的理解途径。

title: Thermodynamic accessibility of Li-Mn-Ti-O cation disordered rock-salt phases
summary: Disordered rock-salt with Li-excess (DRX) cathode phases within the Li-Mn-Ti-O (LMTO) composition space have recently been extensively studied, as they promise to deliver exceptional energy density at low cost in Li-ion batteries. The continued development of LMTO DRX with improved power density and cycling stability requires optimization of the composition and particle size/morphology, which are determined by synthesis conditions such as annealing temperatures and hold times. These challenges motivate our investigation of the phase diagram of the LMTO rock-salt phase space, with a focus on understanding the stability of DRX by quantifying the order-disorder transition temperature ($T_\text{disord}$) as a function of composition. We harness first-principles calculations and X-ray diffraction experiments to establish the LMTO phase diagram, which lies within the LiMnO$_2$ -- Li$_2$MnO$_3$ -- Li$_2$TiO$_3$ pseudo-ternary. Our calculations predict that the LMTO phase diagram at elevated temperature ($700 - 1300$ C) is composed of three phases: DRX, orthorhombic LiMnO$_2$, and layered Li$_2$Mn$_\text{1-y}$Ti$_\text{y}$O$_3$ ($0 < \text{y} < 1$). $T_\text{disord}$ decreases significantly as off-stoichiometry is introduced to the end-point compositions, resulting in a eutectoid phase diagram. Importantly, a significant range of LMTO compositions containing small to moderate fractions of Li-excess and Ti doping (relative to LiMnO$_2$) have $T_\text{disord}$ spanning $700 - 900$ C. These temperatures are substantially lower than conventional DRX synthesis temperatures ($\geq 1000$ C), suggesting the promise of decreasing synthesis temperatures for specific DRX compositions. The compositions containing moderate to high fractions of Mn$^{4+}$ instead have much greater $T_\text{disord}$ and phase separation to layered Li$_2$MnO$_3$ becomes highly favored.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过第一性原理计算和X射线衍射实验，建立了Li-Mn-Ti-O（LMTO）无序岩盐（DRX）阴极材料的相图，确定了无序-有序转变温度（T_disord）随成分的变化，为优化合成条件提供了指导。
AI.motivation: LMTO DRX阴极材料在锂离子电池中具有高能量密度和低成本潜力，但其功率密度和循环稳定性需要优化。合成条件（如退火温度和时间）影响成分和颗粒尺寸/形貌，因此需要理解DRX的稳定性，特别是无序-有序转变温度随成分的变化。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算和X射线衍射实验，在LiMnO2-Li2MnO3-Li2TiO3伪三元体系中建立LMTO相图，重点量化无序-有序转变温度（T_disord）随成分的变化关系。
AI.result: LMTO相图在700-1300°C范围内包含三个相：DRX、正交LiMnO2和层状Li2Mn1-yTiyO3。T_disord随端点成分偏离化学计量比而显著降低，形成共析相图。具有小到中等Li过量及Ti掺杂的LMTO成分，其T_disord在700-900°C范围内，远低于传统DRX合成温度（≥1000°C）。而含中高比例Mn4+的成分则具有更高的T_disord，且倾向于相分离为层状Li2MnO3。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了LMTO DRX材料的相稳定性和无序-有序转变行为，为降低特定DRX成分的合成温度提供了可能，有助于优化合成条件以改善材料性能。

title: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo enhanced by Exact Diagonalization
summary: Strongly correlated fermionic systems are of great interest in condensed matter physics and numerical methods are indispensable tools for their study. However, existing approaches such as exact diagonalization (ED) and stochastic quantum Monte Carlo methods each suffer from fundamental limitations: ED is hindered by exponential scaling in system size, while Monte Carlo methods are plagued by sign problems and long autocorrelation times. These limitations restrict the accessible parameter space and developing algorithms that efficiently alleviate them remains a central challenge in computational physics. In this work, we propose a hybrid algorithm that combines ED and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) to simulate 2D arrays of coupled quantum wires, modeled as interacting fermionic Hubbard chains. We demonstrate how our hybrid implementation of HMC, which we dub H$^2$MC, outperforms either method alone across several key simulation facets. When compared to pure ED, H$^2$MC has a much more favorable computational scaling, which allows us to push simulations to much larger 2D arrays. H$^2$MC also greatly alleviates the sign problem and reduces autocorrelation times when compared to pure HMC formulations utilizing either real or imaginary auxiliary fields. Our formalism demonstrates how complementary strengths of seemingly disparate methods can be leveraged to enable feasible simulations in an extended parameter space.

AI.tldr: 提出H²MC混合算法，结合精确对角化和哈密顿蒙特卡洛，用于模拟耦合量子线的二维阵列，相比单一方法在计算复杂度、符号问题和自相关时间方面均有显著改善。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在根本性限制：精确对角化受限于系统尺寸的指数级扩展，而蒙特卡洛方法面临符号问题和长自相关时间。这些限制约束了可访问的参数空间，开发能有效缓解这些问题的算法是计算物理的核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出H²MC混合算法，结合精确对角化和哈密顿蒙特卡洛，用于模拟作为相互作用费米子哈伯德链的耦合量子线二维阵列。该混合实现利用两种方法的互补优势。
AI.result: H²MC相比纯精确对角化具有更有利的计算扩展性，能模拟更大的二维阵列；相比纯哈密顿蒙特卡洛（使用实或虚辅助场）显著缓解符号问题并减少自相关时间。
AI.conclusion: 展示了如何利用看似不同方法的互补优势，在扩展参数空间中实现可行的模拟，为强关联费米子系统研究提供了更有效的计算工具。

title: ${H}$-linear magnetoresistance in the ${T^2}$ resistivity regime of overdoped infinite-layer nickelate La$_{1-x}$Sr$_{x}$NiO$_2$
summary: We report a systematic magnetotransport study on high-crystallinity La$_{1-x}$Sr$_{x}$NiO$_2$ (LSNO) thin films with $x=0.20-0.24$. By conducting pulsed-field transport experiment up to 62 T, we reveal two salient features of the normal-state transport in overdoped LSNO thin films: (1) the magnetoresistance does not follow the Kohler's rule but exhibits a $H$-linear behavior in the high $H/T$ limit and (2) the normal-state $ρ(T)$ below 30 K consistently follows a $T^2$ behavior across the overdoped regime. Our results demonstrate a coexistence of $H$-linear magnetoresistance and $T^2$ resistivity in a model unconventional superconductor and provide new information on the transport characteristics of the normal ground state that host superconductivity in infinite-layer nickelates.

AI.tldr: 在过掺杂La₁₋ₓSrₓNiO₂薄膜中发现了H线性磁阻和T²电阻行为的共存，为无限层镍酸盐超导体的正常态输运特性提供了新信息。
AI.motivation: 研究无限层镍酸盐超导体的正常态输运特性，特别是磁阻行为和电阻温度依赖关系，以理解其超导机制和正常态物理性质。
AI.method: 对高质量La₁₋ₓSrₓNiO₂薄膜（x=0.20-0.24）进行系统磁输运研究，使用脉冲磁场高达62T，分析磁阻和电阻的温度、磁场依赖关系。
AI.result: 发现两个关键特征：1) 磁阻不遵循Kohler规则，在高H/T极限下呈现H线性行为；2) 30K以下的正常态电阻在过掺杂区域一致遵循T²行为。
AI.conclusion: 在模型非常规超导体中首次观察到H线性磁阻和T²电阻的共存，为无限层镍酸盐超导体的正常态基态输运特性提供了重要信息。

title: Strain-driven spin mixing and dark-exciton recombination in a neutral Ni2+ doped quantum dot
summary: We investigate the optical properties of neutral excitons in CdTe/ZnTe quantum dots containing a single Ni2+ ion. We show that the photoluminescence spectra provide a direct spectroscopic signature of strain induced mixing of the Ni2+ spin states. A misalignment between the principal axis of the local strain tensor and the quantum dot growth direction reorients the spin quantization axis of the magnetic ion, reducing the hole Ni2+ exchange interaction at low magnetic field and giving rise to photoluminescence replicas around the partially linearly polarized bright-exciton transitions. A longitudinal magnetic field restores the circularly polarized optical selection rules, allowing the three spin projections S_z = 0, +-1 of the Ni2+ ion to be spectrally resolved. Dark exciton emission appears on the low energy side of the spectra and is dominated at low field by transitions involving spin flips of the magnetic ion. An effective spin Hamiltonian including strain orientation and valence band mixing reproduces the magnetic field evolution of both bright and dark exciton spectra. These results highlight the key role of the local strain environment in determining the spin exciton coupling of transition metal dopants in semiconductor quantum dots.

AI.tldr: 研究CdTe/ZnTe量子点中单个Ni2+离子的中性激子光学性质，发现应变诱导的Ni2+自旋态混合可通过光致发光光谱直接表征，局部应变方向影响磁离子自旋量子化轴，磁场可恢复光学选择规则。
AI.motivation: 研究过渡金属掺杂半导体量子点中局部应变环境如何影响磁离子与激子的自旋耦合，这对于量子信息处理和自旋电子学应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过测量CdTe/ZnTe量子点中单个Ni2+离子的光致发光光谱，分析应变诱导的自旋态混合效应，结合有效自旋哈密顿量模型（包含应变方向和价带混合）来模拟磁场下亮激子和暗激子光谱的演化。
AI.result: 光致发光光谱直接显示了应变诱导的Ni2+自旋态混合特征；应变张量主轴与量子点生长方向的错位会重新定向磁离子的自旋量子化轴，降低低磁场下的空穴-Ni2+交换相互作用；纵向磁场可恢复圆偏振光学选择规则，使Ni2+离子的三个自旋投影S_z = 0, ±1能够光谱分辨；暗激子发射出现在光谱低能侧，低场下主要由磁离子自旋翻转跃迁主导。
AI.conclusion: 局部应变环境在决定半导体量子点中过渡金属掺杂剂的自旋-激子耦合方面起着关键作用，这一发现对于理解和调控量子点中自旋相关光学性质具有重要意义。

title: Exactly Solvable Disorder-free Quantum Breakdown Model: Spectrum, Thermodynamics, and Dynamics
summary: We introduce and study a disorder-free version of the quantum breakdown model with all-to-all interactions. The Hamiltonian factorizes into the product of the zero-momentum-mode occupation number and a quadratic Hamiltonian including only pairing terms. This structure makes the model exactly solvable and produces a large set of zero-energy states. We analyze its spectral, thermodynamic, and dynamical properties. In particular, we show how the factorized structure shapes the spectral form factor and the real-time dynamics. We also compute two-point functions and out-of-time-ordered correlators (OTOCs), and find a distinct early-time growth regime in the OTOCs. These results provide a solvable setting in which spectral properties and real-time dynamics can be analyzed in a controlled way in the absence of disorder, spatial structure, and environmental coupling.

AI.tldr: 提出并研究了一个无无序、全连接相互作用的量子击穿模型，该模型哈密顿量可分解为零动量模式占据数与仅含配对项的二次哈密顿量的乘积，使其精确可解并产生大量零能态。
AI.motivation: 在无无序、无空间结构、无环境耦合的情况下，提供一个精确可解的模型来研究光谱特性和实时动力学，填补了传统需要无序或空间结构的可解模型的空白。
AI.method: 构建了一个无无序的全连接量子击穿模型，其哈密顿量具有特殊的因子化结构：零动量模式占据数与仅含配对项的二次哈密顿量的乘积。这种结构使得模型精确可解，并产生大量零能态。
AI.result: 分析了模型的光谱、热力学和动力学特性，展示了因子化结构如何塑造光谱形式因子和实时动力学。计算了两点函数和失序时间关联函数(OTOCs)，在OTOCs中发现了独特的早期增长机制。
AI.conclusion: 该模型提供了一个在无无序、无空间结构、无环境耦合情况下的精确可解框架，使得光谱特性和实时动力学能够在受控方式下进行分析，为研究量子多体系统的动力学行为提供了新工具。

title: Exactly Solvable RD Model: RG Cycles Meet Fractality
summary: We consider the Bethe ansatz integrable Russian Doll (RD) model of superconductivity with time-reversal symmetry breaking, which exhibits a cyclic renormalization group. By obtaining an exact solution for the renormalization group flows, we investigate the phase structure in the one-pair sector, which includes localized, fractal, and delocalized phases. We show that the quantum number Q, arising from the Bethe ansatz equations, counts the number of cycles and parametrizes the towers of states. Using the action of the renormalization group on the eigenstates, we demonstrate that Q serves as an order parameter, providing a new mechanism for the formation of the fractal phase in the deterministic systems and an example of the interplay between fractality and cyclic RG.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有时间反演对称性破缺的俄罗斯娃娃超导模型，通过精确求解重整化群流，在一对电子子空间中发现局域化、分形和退局域化相，并证明量子数Q可作为序参数描述分形相形成。
AI.motivation: 研究俄罗斯娃娃超导模型中重整化群的循环行为与分形相形成机制之间的相互作用，探索确定性系统中分形相的新形成机制。
AI.method: 采用Bethe ansatz可积方法，精确求解重整化群流方程，在一对电子子空间中分析相结构，利用重整化群在特征态上的作用研究量子数Q的物理意义。
