AI.result: 发现量子数Q计数循环次数并参数化状态塔，可作为序参数描述相变，揭示了确定性系统中分形相形成的新机制，展示了分形性与循环重整化群之间的相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 量子数Q作为序参数为理解俄罗斯娃娃模型中的分形相提供了新视角，展示了循环重整化群与分形性之间的深刻联系，为研究可积系统中的相结构开辟了新途径。

title: Symmetry-Driven Electrical Switching of Anisotropic Skyrmion Hall Effect in Altermagnets
summary: Controlling the skyrmion Hall effect (SkHE) is pivotal for developing topological spintronics but typically relies on magnetic field reversal. Here, we demonstrate a general strategy for the purely electrical switching of the SkHE in two-dimensional altermagnets. Through symmetry and model analysis, we reveal that the intrinsic altermagnetic symmetry imposes sublattice-dependent anisotropic exchange and Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya interactions. These interactions induce a highly anisotropic SkHE, where the transverse velocity is strictly dictated by the current direction relative to the crystal axes. Crucially, we show that an external electric field can strongly modulate these interaction parameters by inversing the altermagnetic symmetry, allowing for the reversible inversion of the anisotropic SkHE. Using first-principles and atomistic spin model simulations, this mechanism is further demonstrated in monolayer CaMnSn. Our study establishes a unique strategy for realizing precise, electrically tunable skyrmion transport without magnetic fields.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种在二维反铁磁体中纯电控调控斯格明子霍尔效应的新策略，无需磁场反转。
AI.motivation: 控制斯格明子霍尔效应对于发展拓扑自旋电子学至关重要，但传统方法通常依赖磁场反转。本研究旨在探索纯电控的调控策略。
AI.method: 通过对称性和模型分析揭示反铁磁对称性导致的亚晶格依赖各向异性交换和Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya相互作用；利用第一性原理和原子自旋模型模拟在单层CaMnSn中验证该机制。
AI.result: 发现反铁磁对称性诱导高度各向异性的斯格明子霍尔效应，其横向速度严格由电流方向相对于晶轴决定；外部电场可通过反转反铁磁对称性强烈调制相互作用参数，实现各向异性斯格明子霍尔效应的可逆反转。
AI.conclusion: 本研究建立了一种无需磁场的精确电控可调斯格明子输运的独特策略，为拓扑自旋电子学发展提供了新途径。

title: Superconducting Lanthanum Nickel Oxides with Bilayered and Trilayered Crystal Structures
comment: The revised version of this paper has been published in J. Phys. Condens. Matter 38 (2026) 073002. DOI: 10.1088/1361-648X/ae4155
summary:
In 2023, superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ was discovered under high pressures above approximately 14 GPa. In addition to its high transition temperature ($T_{\mathrm{c}} \simeq 80$ K), the structural resemblance to high-$T_{\mathrm{c}}$ cuprates has strongly stimulated research, soon followed by the discovery of superconductivity in La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. These compounds belong to the Ruddlesden--Popper phases, comprising double- and triple-layered NiO$_2$ square lattices separated by LaO rock-salt slabs.
  Research on these systems has rapidly developed along three major directions, as in other prominent families of superconductors such as the cuprates and iron arsenides: expanding the chemical variety of compounds, enhancing $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ through elemental substitution, and elucidating the superconducting mechanism. These challenges, being closely interconnected, continue to drive the field. The clarification of the pairing mechanism encounters a particular difficulty, since the key experiments must be performed under high pressures. This situation highlights the significance of developing nickel oxides that exhibit superconductivity at much lower pressures, ideally at ambient pressure, which would in turn broaden the scope of chemical tuning and detailed physical characterization.
  In this context, it is timely and meaningful to summarize the present state of knowledge. Here, we emphasize sample synthesis and characterization, which are already well established and often decisive for progress in unconventional superconductors, while providing a brief overview of the currently available electronic properties.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了高压下La₃Ni₂O₇和La₄Ni₃O₁₀等镍氧化物超导体的研究现状，重点关注样品合成与表征，旨在推动开发常压超导镍氧化物以促进机理研究。
AI.motivation: 2023年发现的高压镍氧化物超导体La₃Ni₂O₇具有高达80K的转变温度，其结构与高温超导铜氧化物相似，激发了广泛研究。然而，高压实验条件限制了对其超导机理的深入研究，因此需要开发能在常压或更低压力下超导的镍氧化物，以拓宽化学调控范围和物理表征手段。
AI.method: 本文采用综述方法，重点总结样品合成与表征技术（这些在非常规超导体研究中已相当成熟且对进展至关重要），同时简要概述当前可获得的电子性质数据。
AI.result: 总结了镍氧化物超导体研究的三大方向：扩展化合物化学多样性、通过元素替代提高Tc、阐明超导机理。这些挑战相互关联，持续推动该领域发展。特别强调了开发常压超导镍氧化物对机理研究的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 当前是总结镍氧化物超导体知识现状的恰当时机。样品合成与表征技术已相当成熟，对非常规超导体研究进展至关重要。开发常压超导镍氧化物将极大促进超导机理的阐明和化学调控范围的扩大。

title: Field-induced quasi-bound state within the two-magnon continuum of a square-lattice Heisenberg antiferromagnet
comment: Main Manuscript (13 pages, 5 figures) + appended Supplementary Information (SI: 16 pages, 17 figures)
summary: Quantum magnets in two dimensions display strong quantum interaction effects even when magnetically ordered. Using the metal-organic framework material CuF$_2$(D$_2$O)$_2$(pyz), we investigate the field-dependent spin dynamics of the $S = 1/2$ square-lattice Heisenberg antiferromagnet by high-resolution inelastic neutron scattering to applied fields beyond one third of saturation. We discover an anomalously sharp, dispersive ``shadow mode'' residing within the two-magnon continuum, which shadows the dispersion of the transverse one-magnon branches across the Brillouin zone at an offset equal to the Larmor energy. We perform cylinder matrix-product-state (MPS) calculations that reproduce the field-induced spectrum quantitatively and apply a spectrally consistent $1/S$ spin-wave theory to deduce that the ``Larmor-shadow mode'' is a composite two-magnon resonance: a dispersing magnon at wavevector ${\bf Q}$ couples to the uniform Larmor precession at $Γ$, its small intrinsic linewidth indicating a non-perturbative effect of attractive magnon-magnon interactions. Another quantum-fluctuation phenomenon, the zero-field $(π,0)$ anomaly, is lost at increasing fields, which tighten the spectral weight into the one-magnon and Larmor-shadow modes. To our knowledge, these results constitute the first observation of a sharp quasi-bound state embedded in the continuum of a gapless two-dimensional antiferromagnet.

AI.tldr: 在二维量子磁体CuF$_2$(D$_2$O)$_2$(pyz)中，通过中子散射发现了磁场诱导的"拉莫尔阴影模式"，这是一种嵌入双磁子连续谱中的尖锐准束缚态，由磁子-磁子相互作用形成。
AI.motivation: 研究二维量子磁体在磁场下的自旋动力学，探索量子相互作用效应，特别是在磁有序系统中寻找新的量子涨落现象和准束缚态。
AI.method: 使用高分辨率非弹性中子散射测量磁场下的自旋动力学，结合圆柱矩阵乘积态(MPS)计算进行定量分析，并应用谱一致的1/S自旋波理论解释观测现象。
AI.result: 发现了"拉莫尔阴影模式"——一种在双磁子连续谱中尖锐、色散的准束缚态，其色散关系与横向单磁子分支平行但偏移一个拉莫尔能量。该模式在布里渊区内都保持尖锐，表明磁子-磁子相互作用的非微扰效应。
AI.conclusion: 首次在无隙二维反铁磁体中观测到尖锐的准束缚态嵌入连续谱，揭示了磁子-磁子相互作用的非微扰效应，为理解二维量子磁体中的量子涨落现象提供了新视角。

title: Critical Scaling of Finite-Size Fluctuations around Marginal Stability in Long-Range Hamiltonian Systems
summary: Finite size fluctuations are a crucial ingredient in kinetic theory of long-range interacting collisionless systems. In this Letter, we introduce a phenomenological theory which predicts an anomalous scaling close to marginal stability for these fluctuations. It also pinpoints the critical window inside which the fluctuations are anomalous, and outside which they are Gaussian. Shrinking very slowly as $N^{-1/5}$, this critical window encompasses a wide region around marginal stability. We confirm our predictions through extended numerical simulations on two different simplified models.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种关于长程相互作用无碰撞系统中有限尺寸涨落的唯象理论，预测了接近边际稳定性时的反常标度行为，并确定了反常涨落与高斯涨落的临界窗口。
AI.motivation: 有限尺寸涨落是长程相互作用无碰撞系统动力学理论的关键组成部分。理解这些涨落在接近边际稳定性时的行为对于深入认识这类系统的统计特性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者引入了一种唯象理论来预测接近边际稳定性时涨落的反常标度行为。该理论确定了反常涨落与高斯涨落之间的临界窗口，并通过在两个不同的简化模型上进行扩展数值模拟来验证理论预测。
AI.result: 理论预测显示临界窗口以N^{-1/5}的缓慢速率收缩，这意味着在边际稳定性周围存在一个宽广的反常涨落区域。数值模拟结果证实了理论预测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功建立了一个能够描述长程相互作用无碰撞系统中有限尺寸涨落行为的唯象理论框架，揭示了接近边际稳定性时涨落的反常标度特性，并确定了反常涨落区域的范围。

title: Single-pair charge-2 Weyl-Dirac composite semimetals
summary: The Nielsen--Ninomiya theorem requires that the total topological chiral charges in a crystal vanish, a constraint typically satisfied by identical nodes like Weyl--Weyl pairs. Whether a minimal heterogeneous configuration -- comprising a single Weyl point (WP) and a single Dirac point (DP) -- can exist in an electronic system has remained unresolved. Here, by systematically classifying all 1651 magnetic space groups (MSGs), we reveal that only 14 MSGs without spin-orbit coupling (SOC) and 10 MSGs with SOC are compatible with this exotic state. Furthermore, for nonmagnetic crystals, this configuration is uniquely realized in the spinless limit of chiral space groups 92 and 96. Guided by this principle, we predict an ideal realization in chiral three-dimensional boron allotropes (SDHBN-B$_{28}$ enantiomers). First-principles calculations unveil a $|C|=2$ WP at the $Γ$ point and a $|C|=2$ DP at the $A$ point, which constitute the only fermions near the Fermi level within a large $2$ eV energy window. Strikingly, the structural chirality rigidly dictates the sign of the topological charges, yielding two ultralong Fermi arcs spanning the surface Brillouin zone. Our work provides a complete crystallographic classification and a definitive material platform for exploring minimal heterogeneous chiral fermions.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过系统分类1651个磁空间群，发现只有少数空间群支持由单个外尔点和单个狄拉克点组成的异质手征费米子最小构型，并在手性三维硼同素异形体中预测了理想实现。
AI.motivation: Nielsen-Ninomiya定理要求晶体中总拓扑手征荷为零，通常通过相同节点（如外尔-外尔对）实现。是否存在由单个外尔点和单个狄拉克点组成的最小异质构型一直未解决。
AI.method: 系统分类所有1651个磁空间群，分析无自旋轨道耦合和有自旋轨道耦合情况下的兼容性；基于分类结果预测手性三维硼同素异形体（SDHBN-B28对映体）；使用第一性原理计算验证拓扑特性。
AI.result: 发现只有14个无SOC磁空间群和10个有SOC磁空间群支持该构型；非磁性晶体中仅在无自旋极限的手性空间群92和96中实现；预测材料中Γ点存在|C|=2外尔点，A点存在|C|=2狄拉克点，两者在2eV能量窗口内是唯一的费米子；结构手性严格决定拓扑荷符号，产生两个跨越表面布里渊区的超长费米弧。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了完整的晶体学分类和确定性的材料平台，为探索最小异质手征费米子奠定了基础，揭示了结构手性与拓扑荷之间的刚性关联。

title: Electron-Hole Scattering Dichotomy and Anisotropic Warping in Quasi-Two-Dimensional Fermi Surfaces of UTe2
summary: We present a combined experimental and theoretical study of the detailed Fermi-surface (FS) geometry of UTe2, a heavy-fermion superconductor that has recently attracted considerable attention as a promising candidate for spin-triplet pairing. Using angle-dependent magnetoresistance oscillations, a bulk- and low-energy-sensitive transport probe for quasi-two-dimensional (Q2D) electronic structures, we directly determine the in-plane FS geometry. We found that the Q2D FS exhibits a rectangular cross-sectional shape with strongly anisotropic warping, originating from the hybridization of two orthogonal quasi-one-dimensional bands. Through a quantitative comparison between experiment and theoretical calculations, we further reveal a large electron-hole scattering dichotomy: the quasiparticle lifetime on the electron FS is substantially shorter than that on the hole FS. This dichotomy is naturally explained by anisotropic, low-dimensional antiferromagnetic fluctuations, which selectively enhance scattering on the electron FS. This suggests a dominant role of the electron pockets for the emergence of superconductivity. Our results clarify a direct relation between FS geometry, magnetic fluctuations, and momentum-dependent quasiparticle lifetimes, and thus providing a crucial basis for the microscopic understanding of pairing mechanism, and impose stringent constraints on the gap symmetry of spin-triplet superconductivity in UTe2.

AI.tldr: 实验与理论研究UTe2费米面几何，发现矩形截面形状和强各向异性扭曲，源自两个正交准一维能带杂化。揭示电子-空穴散射二分性：电子费米面上的准粒子寿命显著短于空穴费米面，由低维反铁磁涨落选择性增强电子散射解释。
AI.motivation: UTe2作为重费米子超导体，是自旋三重态配对的有力候选材料。研究其详细费米面几何对于理解超导配对机制至关重要，特别是费米面几何、磁涨落和准粒子寿命之间的关系。
AI.method: 结合实验与理论研究：使用角度依赖磁阻振荡（对二维电子结构敏感的体积输运探针）直接确定面内费米面几何；通过实验与理论计算的定量比较分析准粒子寿命。
AI.result: 发现准二维费米面呈现矩形截面形状，具有强各向异性扭曲；揭示电子-空穴散射二分性，电子费米面上的准粒子寿命显著短于空穴费米面；这种二分性由低维反铁磁涨落选择性增强电子散射解释，表明电子口袋对超导出现起主导作用。
AI.conclusion: 阐明了费米面几何、磁涨落和动量依赖准粒子寿命之间的直接关系，为微观理解UTe2中自旋三重态超导的配对机制提供了关键基础，并对能隙对称性施加了严格约束。

title: Strongly entangled Quantum Spin Rings driven by Hückel rule
summary: Quantum spin rings represent an intriguing platform for studying unconventional magnetic order and exotic quantum phases, and they are also promising materials for emerging quantum technologies. Conventional spin systems consist of a set of weakly interacting localized spins that are well described by the Heisenberg spin models. Here, we demonstrate that strong interactions between radical centers in macrocycles of different sizes lead to fluctuations in the total number of unpaired electrons and to non-trivial antiferromagnetic order that extends beyond the Heisenberg picture. We demonstrate that the electronic structure of these spin rings is governed by the concept of 4n/4n+2 Hückel (anti)aromaticity for even-membered rings, whereas odd-membered rings possess a highly degenerate frustrated magnetic ground state. The strongly coupled spin rings are experimentally realized through the on-surface synthesis of π-magnetic carbon-based macrocycles, which consist of [2]triangulene units. The close correlation between the electronic structure and the Hückel aromaticity rule is revealed by scanning tunneling spectroscopy and multireference calculations. This work establishes a novel design principle employing the concept of Hückel aromaticity for quantum spin macrocycles.

AI.tldr: 该论文展示了强相互作用的自由基中心在环状分子中导致非传统反铁磁序和电子数涨落，建立了基于Hückel芳香性原理的量子自旋环设计新范式。
AI.motivation: 传统自旋系统通常由弱相互作用的局域自旋组成，可用海森堡模型描述。但强相互作用的自由基中心在环状分子中可能导致超越海森堡图像的非传统磁序和量子相，这对于研究非常规磁序和量子技术应用具有重要意义。
AI.method: 通过表面合成方法制备π磁性碳基大环分子（由[2]triangulene单元组成），结合扫描隧道光谱和多参考计算，揭示电子结构与Hückel芳香性规则的紧密关联。
AI.result: 强相互作用导致未配对电子总数涨落和非传统反铁磁序。偶数环遵循4n/4n+2 Hückel（反）芳香性规则，奇数环具有高度简并的受挫磁基态。实验证实了电子结构与Hückel芳香性原理的密切关联。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了基于Hückel芳香性概念的量子自旋大环分子设计新原理，为研究非常规磁序和开发量子技术材料提供了新思路。

title: Quasi-local Edge Mode in XXX Spin Chain/Circuit with Interaction Boundary Defect
comment: 5+5 pages in revtex with 5+1 pdf figures
summary: We study the Heisenberg spin-1/2 model on a semi-infinite chain - or, equivalently, a trotterized unitary SU(2) symmetric six-vertex quantum circuit - with a boundary defect where the interaction between the two spins nearest the edge differs from that in the bulk. For sufficiently strong boundary interaction we explicitly construct a conserved operator quasi-localized near the boundary using a matrix-product ansatz. This quasi-local edge mode leads to non-decaying boundary correlation functions, corresponding to a nonzero boundary Drude weight. The correlation length of the edge mode diverges at a finite critical value of the boundary interaction, signaling a transition to ergodic boundary dynamics for subcritical interactions.

AI.tldr: 研究半无限链上的海森堡自旋-1/2模型，发现边界缺陷在强边界相互作用下会产生准局域边缘模式，导致边界关联函数不衰减，对应非零边界Drude权重。
AI.motivation: 研究具有边界缺陷的量子自旋系统，探索边界相互作用如何影响系统的动力学行为，特别是边界关联函数的衰减特性。
AI.method: 使用矩阵乘积态（MPS）构造准局域守恒算子，分析半无限链上的海森堡自旋-1/2模型，该模型等价于具有SU(2)对称性的六顶点量子电路。
AI.result: 在足够强的边界相互作用下，成功构造出准局域边缘模式，导致边界关联函数不衰减（非零边界Drude权重）。边缘模式的相关长度在边界相互作用的临界值处发散，表明亚临界相互作用下边界动力学会变得遍历。
AI.conclusion: 边界缺陷可以产生准局域边缘模式，显著影响量子系统的边界动力学行为，存在从非遍历边界动力学到遍历边界动力学的相变。

title: GPUMDkit: A User-Friendly Toolkit for GPUMD and NEP
summary: Machine-learned interatomic potentials have revolutionized molecular dynamics simulations by providing quantum-mechanical accuracy at empirical-potential speeds. The graphics processing unit molecular dynamics (GPUMD) package, featuring the highly efficient neuroevolution potential (NEP) framework, has emerged as a powerful tool in this domain. However, the complexity of force field development, active learning, and trajectory post-processing often requires extensive manual scripting, imposing a steep learning curve on new users. To address this, we present GPUMDkit, a comprehensive and user-friendly toolkit that streamlines the entire simulation workflow for GPUMD and NEP. GPUMDkit integrates a suite of essential functionalities, including format conversion, structure sampling, property calculation, and data visualization, accessible through both interactive and command-line interfaces. Its modular, extensible architecture ensures accessibility for users of all experience levels while allowing seamless integration of new features. By automating complex tasks and enhancing productivity, GPUMDkit substantially lowers the barrier to using GPUMD and NEP programs. This article describes the program architecture and demonstrates its capabilities through practical applications.

AI.tldr: GPUMDkit是一个用户友好的工具包，旨在简化GPUMD和NEP分子动力学模拟的整个工作流程，通过自动化复杂任务降低使用门槛。
AI.motivation: 机器学习原子间势能在分子动力学模拟中提供了量子力学精度，但GPUMD和NEP的使用需要大量手动脚本编写，对新用户学习曲线陡峭，需要更易用的工具来降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 开发了GPUMDkit工具包，集成了格式转换、结构采样、性质计算和数据可视化等核心功能，提供交互式和命令行界面，采用模块化、可扩展的架构设计。
AI.result: GPUMDkit通过实际应用展示了其能力，能够自动化复杂任务，提高生产力，显著降低了使用GPUMD和NEP程序的门槛。
AI.conclusion: GPUMDkit作为一个全面的用户友好工具包，通过简化整个模拟工作流程，使不同经验水平的用户都能更轻松地使用GPUMD和NEP进行分子动力学模拟。

title: Reaching Quantum Critical Point by Adding Non-magnetic Disorder in Single Crystals of Superconductor $(\text{Ca}_x\text{Sr}_{1-x})_3\text{Rh}_4\text{Sn}_{13}$
summary: The Remeika series superconductor, $(\text{Ca}_x\text{Sr}_{1-x})_3\text{Rh}_4\text{Sn}_{13}$, shows a rare nonmagnetic quantum critical point (QCP) associated with the continuous charge-density wave (CDW) and structural transition under the ``dome'' of superconductivity achieved by tuning composition and applying pressure. Here we use a nonmagnetic point-like disorder induced by 2.5 MeV electron irradiation to suppress the CDW and drive the system to and even beyond the QCP. This conclusion is based on a clear evolution of temperature-dependent resistivity, $ρ\left(T\right)$, from the Fermi liquid to the non-Fermi liquid regime with increasing amount of disorder. Starting on the CDW side, below the suggested QCP concentration of $x_c=0.9$, added disorder resulted in a progressively larger linear term and a reduced quadratic term in $ρ\left(T\right)$. Nearly perfect $T-$linear dependence is observed at the dose at which long-range CDW order is suppressed to $T=$0, consistent with the expectations. We refine the QCP location in this system and place it in the interval between $x=$0.75 and 0.85. Our results strongly support the concept that the disorder can tune the system to the quantum critical regime and even beyond. It follows from the argument by Imry and Ma that any ordered phase is unstable toward quenched disorder. Introduced in a controlled way, this disorder becomes a novel non-thermal tuning parameter likely applicable to a variety of different systems.

AI.tldr: 通过电子辐照引入点状无序，抑制Ca-Sr-Rh-Sn超导体中的电荷密度波，驱动系统达到甚至超越量子临界点，观察到电阻从费米液体到非费米液体的转变。
AI.motivation: 研究Remeika系列超导体中与电荷密度波相关的非磁性量子临界点，探索无序作为非热调谐参数驱动系统达到量子临界区域的可能性。
AI.method: 使用2.5 MeV电子辐照引入非磁性点状无序，通过测量温度依赖电阻率ρ(T)的变化，分析费米液体和非费米液体行为的转变，确定电荷密度波被抑制的条件。
AI.result: 无序增加导致电阻率从费米液体（二次项）向非费米液体（线性项）转变；在长程电荷密度波被完全抑制的辐照剂量下，观察到近乎完美的T-线性依赖；将量子临界点位置精确定位在x=0.75-0.85之间。
AI.conclusion: 无序可以作为有效的非热调谐参数驱动系统达到量子临界区域甚至超越，支持了Imry-Ma关于有序相对淬火无序不稳定的论点，这一方法可推广到其他系统。

title: Site-selective renormalization and competing magnetic instabilities in paramagnet Y$_{3}$Cu$_{2}$Sb$_{3}$O$_{14}$
summary: Quantum spin liquids (QSLs) are exotic phases of matter characterized by long-range entanglement and the absence of magnetic order even at zero temperature. Here, we present a comprehensive theoretical study of the frustrated magnet Y$_{3}$Cu$_{2}$Sb$_{3}$O$_{14}$ to elucidate its electronic and magnetic properties. We uncover two inequivalent Cu sites with fundamentally distinct oxygen coordination, i.e. octahedral CuO$_6$ and axially compressed CuO$_8$, that give rise to completely opposite crystal-field splittings. This inversion places the unpaired hole in the $d_{z^2}$ orbital at the Cu-2 site, while Cu-1 maintains conventional $d_{x^2-y^2}/d_{xy}$ character, producing narrow bands at commensurate filling. Dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) calculation reveals a selective band-renormalization of orbitals from the two Cu ions with Cu-1 undergoing a Mott transition while Cu-2 remaining metallic under electronic correlations. Crucially, FLEX calculations demonstrate that multiple magnetic instabilities compete with nearly equal strength: the spin susceptibility lacks dominant peaks, and the leading eigenvalues approach unity simultaneously across all wavevectors with increasing interaction. This competitive interplay, originating from the distinct local environments and geometric frustration on the triangular lattice, agrees well with the absence of long-range magnetic order in experiment. Our results suggest Y$_{3}$Cu$_{2}$Sb$_{3}$O$_{14}$ as a promising QSL candidate where the unique combination of disparate crystal-field environments, strong correlations, and competing exchange interactions conspire to stabilize an exotic quantum ground state.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过理论计算揭示了Y3Cu2Sb3O14中两个不等价Cu位点的不同晶体场环境导致选择性轨道重正化和竞争性磁不稳定性，使其成为有前景的量子自旋液体候选材料。
AI.motivation: 研究Y3Cu2Sb3O14的电子和磁性质，以理解其作为量子自旋液体候选材料的物理机制。量子自旋液体是具有长程纠缠和无磁序的奇异物相，即使在零温下也保持无序状态。
AI.method: 采用理论计算方法，包括：1) 分析两个不等价Cu位点的晶体场环境（八面体CuO6和轴向压缩CuO8）；2) 动力学平均场理论(DMFT)计算电子关联效应；3) FLEX计算磁不稳定性。
AI.result: 发现Cu-1位点经历Mott转变，而Cu-2保持金属性；多个磁不稳定性以几乎相等的强度竞争，自旋磁化率缺乏主导峰，所有波矢的领先特征值同时趋近于1。这种竞争性相互作用与实验中观察到的无长程磁序一致。
AI.conclusion: Y3Cu2Sb3O14是很有前景的量子自旋液体候选材料，其独特的晶体场环境差异、强关联效应和竞争性交换相互作用共同稳定了奇异的量子基态。

title: Two stroke Pumping Technique for Many-Body Systems
summary: I introduce a new analytical framework for estimating critical temperatures in interacting many-body systems, focusing on the Ising model. Combining the Bethe cluster setting, the Metropolis update, and the Galam Majority Model developed in sociophysics, I build a two stroke pumping technique (TSP). Applied to the Ising model in dimensions d=2, 3, 4, TSP yields values of T_c which are all at an excess of +0.03 from exact estimates. At d=1 the exact value T_c=0 is obtained. In addition, TSP indicates analytically the practical impossibility to reach full symmetry breaking at T=0. The results are thus found in good agreement with numerical findings while requiring significantly fewer computational resources than Monte Carlo sampling. Calculations are computationally efficient and transparent. The framework is general and can be extended to a broad class of discrete spin models. This positions TSP as an intermediate yet scalable tool for studying cooperative behavior in many body interacting systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的分析框架TSP（两冲程泵浦技术），用于估算相互作用多体系统的临界温度，特别是伊辛模型。该方法结合了Bethe簇、Metropolis更新和社会物理学中的Galam多数模型，在保持计算效率的同时获得与数值结果良好一致的临界温度估计。
AI.motivation: 传统蒙特卡洛采样方法计算临界温度需要大量计算资源，需要开发一种计算效率更高、更透明的分析方法来研究多体相互作用系统的合作行为。
AI.method: 提出TSP（两冲程泵浦技术）框架，结合Bethe簇设置、Metropolis更新和社会物理学中的Galam多数模型。该方法通过两个冲程的泵浦过程来估算临界温度。
AI.result: 在d=2,3,4维伊辛模型中，TSP得到的T_c值比精确估计值高出+0.03；在d=1维时得到精确值T_c=0。同时分析表明在T=0时实际上不可能达到完全对称破缺。结果与数值发现一致，但所需计算资源远少于蒙特卡洛采样。
AI.conclusion: TSP框架作为一种中间但可扩展的工具，可用于研究多体相互作用系统的合作行为。该方法计算高效、透明，可扩展到广泛的离散自旋模型。

title: Direct observation of ultrafast amorphous-amorphous transitions indicated by bond stretching and angle bending in phase-change material GeTe
summary: The intrinsic nature of glass states and glass transitions at the atomic scale remain a fundamental open question in condensed-matter physics and materials science. By combining femtosecond electron diffraction with time-dependent density-functional theory molecular dynamics simulations, we directly observe ultrafast amorphous-amorphous transitions in amorphous GeTe, manifested as rapid Ge-Te (Ge) bond stretching within 0.2 ps and subsequent angle bending of the Ge-Te (Ge)-Ge motif on a 0.5-2 ps timescale. Critically, the ultrafast bond stretching is accompanied by localized oscillation modes with the frequency of 3.10 THz, unambiguously signaling the local Peierls-like bonding structure and the flexibility of these polarized bonds. These ultrafast collective atomic motions provide a direct structural origin for the boson peak and pay the way for systematic optimization of relaxation and crystallization kinetics.

AI.tldr: 通过飞秒电子衍射与分子动力学模拟，首次直接观测到非晶GeTe中的超快非晶-非晶转变，揭示了键拉伸与键角弯曲的动力学过程，为玻色峰提供了结构起源解释。
AI.motivation: 玻璃态和玻璃转变在原子尺度上的本质是凝聚态物理和材料科学中的基本未解问题，需要新的实验和理论方法来揭示其微观机制。
AI.method: 结合飞秒电子衍射实验和基于时间依赖密度泛函理论的分子动力学模拟，研究非晶GeTe中的超快结构动力学。
AI.result: 观测到0.2皮秒内的Ge-Te键快速拉伸和0.5-2皮秒时间尺度的Ge-Te-Ge键角弯曲，发现3.10 THz的局域振荡模式，揭示了类Peierls键合结构和极化键的柔性特征。
AI.conclusion: 这些超快集体原子运动为玻色峰提供了直接的结构起源，并为系统优化弛豫和结晶动力学开辟了新途径。

title: Pressure-induced Superconductivity in AgSbTe2
summary: AgSbTe2 is a well-known thermoelectric material with a high Seebeck coefficient and intrinsically low thermal conductivity, but its behavior under pressure remains largely unexplored. Here we report a systematic investigation of the structural, electronic, and transport properties of non-stoichiometric AgSbTe2 under high pressure. At ambient pressure, the material can be described as having a cubic crystal structure that remains stable up to 21.7 GPa beyond which it loses long-range structural order, while its crystal system fully recovers upon decompression. Remarkably, superconductivity emerges at a very low pressure of 0.38 GPa with an onset superconducting critical temperature (Tc) of 3.2 K. Tc increases with increasing pressure, reaching 6.9 K at 31.9 GPa, and peaks at 7.4 K during decompression. Magnetic-field-dependent transport measurements and electronic structure calculations reveal an evolution of the superconducting state driven by an enhanced electronic density of states at the Fermi level under compression. Our findings uncover pressure-induced superconductivity in AgSbTe2 and demonstrate that pressure can effectively tune the electronic ground state of thermoelectric materials, extending their functionality beyond thermoelectric energy conversion.

AI.tldr: AgSbTe2在高压下出现超导性，临界温度随压力增加而升高，最高达7.4K
AI.motivation: 研究AgSbTe2这种已知热电材料在高压下的行为，探索压力对其结构和电子性质的影响
AI.method: 系统研究非化学计量比AgSbTe2在高压下的结构、电子和输运性质，包括高压X射线衍射、磁化率测量和电子结构计算
AI.result: 在0.38GPa极低压力下出现超导性，Tc随压力增加从3.2K升至6.9K，卸载过程中最高达7.4K；立方结构在21.7GPa前保持稳定，卸载后完全恢复
AI.conclusion: 压力可有效调控热电材料的电子基态，使其功能超越热电能量转换，发现AgSbTe2中的压力诱导超导现象

title: Emergent superconformal symmetry in the phase diagram of a 1D $\mathbb{Z}_{2}$ lattice gauge theory
summary: We investigate the phase diagram and critical properties of a one-dimensional $\mathbb{Z}_{2}$ lattice gauge theory describing an orthogonal metal, where spinless fermions and Ising spins are minimally coupled to a deconfined $\mathbb{Z}_{2}$ gauge field. Working at half-filling of fermions, we derive an exact gauge-invariant formulation that maps the model onto decoupled XXZ and transverse-field Ising chains. This mapping enables a controlled low-energy field-theory description in terms of a perturbed Luttinger liquid and Ising conformal field theories. Combining analytical arguments with numerical simulations, we determine the full phase diagram and identify various critical and multi-critical regimes. Along a specific multi-critical line, where the fermionic and bosonic velocities coincide, we find strong evidence for an emergent superconformal symmetry. Our results establish a minimal lattice realization of emergent superconformal criticalities in a gauge-matter system and provide a route toward its exploration in quantum simulators.

AI.tldr: 一维Z₂规范理论中正交金属的相图与临界性质研究，发现超共形对称性涌现
AI.motivation: 研究规范-物质系统中涌现的超共形临界性，为量子模拟器探索提供路径
AI.method: 通过精确规范不变映射将模型转化为解耦的XXZ和横向场伊辛链，结合场论分析和数值模拟
AI.result: 确定了完整相图，识别了各种临界和多临界区域，在特定多临界线上发现了超共形对称性涌现的证据
AI.conclusion: 建立了规范-物质系统中涌现超共形临界性的最小晶格实现，为量子模拟器探索提供了途径

title: Exploring quantum phase transitions by the cross derivative of the ground state energy
summary: In this work, the cross derivative of the Gibbs free energy, initially proposed for phase transitions in classical spin models [Phys. Rev. B 101, 165123 (2020)], is extended for quantum systems. We take the spin-1 XXZ chain with anisotropies as an example to demonstrate its effectiveness and convenience for the Gaussian-type quantum phase transitions therein. These higher-order transitions are very challenging to determine by conventional methods. From the cross derivative with respect to the two anisotropic strengths, a single valley structure is observed clearly in each system size. The finite-size extrapolation of the valley depth shows a perfect logarithmic divergence, signaling the onset of a phase transition. Meanwhile, the critical point and the critical exponent for the correlation length are obtained by a power-law fitting of the valley location in each size. The results are well consistent with the best estimations in the literature. Its application to other quantum systems with continuous phase transitions is also discussed briefly.

AI.tldr: 将经典自旋模型中提出的吉布斯自由能交叉导数方法扩展到量子系统，用于检测高斯型量子相变，以spin-1 XXZ链为例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以确定高阶量子相变，需要开发新方法来有效检测量子系统中的连续相变。
AI.method: 将经典自旋模型中的吉布斯自由能交叉导数方法扩展到量子系统，以spin-1 XXZ链为例，通过对两个各向异性强度的交叉导数分析，观察单谷结构，并通过有限尺寸外推和幂律拟合确定临界点和临界指数。
AI.result: 在不同系统尺寸下观察到清晰的单谷结构，谷深的有限尺寸外推显示完美的对数发散，表明相变发生。通过谷位置的幂律拟合获得了临界点和关联长度临界指数，结果与文献最佳估计一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效检测量子系统中的连续相变，为研究其他量子系统的相变提供了便利工具。

title: Hydrogen uptake and hydride formation in Al$_x$CoCrFeNi high-entropy alloys: First-principles, universal-potential, and experimental study
summary: Hydrogen uptake in complex multicomponent alloys, including high-entropy alloys (HEAs), governs both hydrogen storage capacity and resistance to hydrogen-induced degradation. We combine high-pressure experiments, density-functional theory (DFT), and a GRACE universal interatomic potential to investigate hydrogen absorption in Al$_{0.3}$CoCrFeNi and Al$_3$CoCrFeNi HEAs. In H$_2$ as a pressure-transmitting medium, the FCC Al$_{0.3}$CoCrFeNi alloy forms hydrides at ambient temperature above 3 GPa, whereas the Al-rich B2 Al$_3$CoCrFeNi alloy shows no evidence of hydride formation even upon heating at pressures up to 50 GPa. Experiments and calculations show that aluminum suppresses hydrogen uptake by increasing solution energies and destabilizing interstitial sites. The universal potential, employed in the calculations and pretrained on large DFT databases, closely reproduces DFT energetics and demonstrates transferability from the dilute limit to the hydride-forming regime. Simulations further disentangle the roles of local ordering, volume changes, composition, and crystal structure. Overall, our results indicate that hydrogen solubility in Al-containing HEAs is governed primarily by composition, with Al-driven B2 ordering as a strong secondary effect.

AI.tldr: Al含量影响高熵合金氢吸收：Al₀.₃CoCrFeNi在3GPa以上形成氢化物，而富Al的Al₃CoCrFeNi在50GPa下仍不形成氢化物，Al通过提高溶解能和破坏间隙位点抑制氢吸收。
AI.motivation: 研究高熵合金等复杂多组分合金中的氢吸收行为，这对于氢存储能力和抗氢致降解性能至关重要，特别关注Al含量对氢吸收的影响机制。
AI.method: 结合高压实验、密度泛函理论(DFT)计算和GRACE通用原子间势方法，研究Al₀.₃CoCrFeNi和Al₃CoCrFeNi两种高熵合金的氢吸收行为。
AI.result: FCC结构的Al₀.₃CoCrFeNi在3GPa以上形成氢化物，而B2结构的Al₃CoCrFeNi在50GPa下仍无氢化物形成；Al通过提高氢溶解能和破坏间隙位点来抑制氢吸收；通用势能准确再现DFT能量学。
AI.conclusion: 含Al高熵合金的氢溶解度主要由成分控制，Al驱动的B2有序化是重要的次要效应；Al含量是调控氢吸收的关键因素。

title: Thermodynamic Discovery of Tetracriticality and Emergent Multicomponent Superconductivity in UTe$_2$
summary: The candidate topological superconductor UTe$_2$ exhibits a complex phase diagram with multiple superconducting states, yet the nature of their coexistence has remained a central mystery. In particular, the apparent intersection of two second-order phase boundaries at a ``triple point'' in the pressure-temperature phase diagram is thermodynamically forbidden, suggesting hidden phase transitions or a fundamental misunderstanding of the superconductivity in UTe$_2$. Here, we use pulse-echo ultrasound to resolve this puzzle by discovering a new phase boundary that is characterized by a unique ``upward jump" in the sound velocity -- direct thermodynamic evidence for a re-entrant phase transition. Our results establish $\left(P^{\star},T^{\star}\right)$ as a tetracrtical point, beyond which the ambient and pressure-induced superconducting order parameters form a multi-component state. We use the measured phase diagram to construct a Ginzburg-Landau theory that shows that strong competition between the two superconducting order parameters drives the re-entrance and leads to phase locking that suppress superconducting fluctuations. These findings provide the definitive magnetic field-temperature-pressure phase diagram and establish a thermodynamic foundation for multi-component -- and potentially topological -- superconductivity in UTe$_2$.

AI.tldr: UTe₂中发现新的相边界和重入相变，解决了热力学上禁止的"三重交点"谜题，建立了四临界点相图，揭示了多分量超导序参量的竞争与锁定机制。
AI.motivation: UTe₂作为候选拓扑超导体具有复杂的多超导态相图，但其中两个二阶相边界在压力-温度相图中形成热力学上禁止的"三重交点"，这暗示存在隐藏相变或对UTe₂超导性的根本误解。
AI.method: 使用脉冲回波超声技术测量声速变化，发现具有独特"向上跳跃"特征的新相边界，这是重入相变的直接热力学证据。基于测量相图构建Ginzburg-Landau理论。
AI.result: 发现(P*,T*)为四临界点，超过该点后常压和压力诱导的超导序参量形成多分量态。两个超导序参量之间的强竞争驱动重入相变，并导致抑制超导涨落的相位锁定。
AI.conclusion: 建立了确定的磁场-温度-压力相图，为UTe₂中的多分量（可能拓扑）超导性提供了热力学基础，解决了长期存在的相图谜题。

title: Polaron-mediated anisotropic exchange in 2D magnets
summary: Two-dimensional (2D) magnets offer a rich platform for exploring emergent spin phenomena due to their unique and diverse magnetic properties. Beyond intrinsic magnetism, external manipulation$\unicode{x2013}$such as defect engineering, molecular adsorption, or charge doping$\unicode{x2013}$offers powerful routes to control their magnetic behavior. In this work, we demonstrate that localized electron polarons provide an effective means to modulate magnetism in 2D magnets. Using first-principles calculations, we investigate polaron formation in monolayer MnPS$_3$ and compute the resulting changes in magnetic exchange interactions. Our results reveal that polarons can locally break magnetic symmetry and induce anisotropic exchange couplings, highlighting a novel mechanism for tuning magnetic textures. This insight opens promising pathways for designing atomic-scale control of magnetism, with potential impact on spintronic technologies.

AI.tldr: 二维磁体中局域电子极化子可有效调控磁性，通过破坏磁对称性和诱导各向异性交换耦合，为原子尺度磁控提供新机制。
AI.motivation: 二维磁体具有丰富的磁性质，但需要外部手段调控其磁性。传统方法如缺陷工程、分子吸附或电荷掺杂已有研究，但局域电子极化子作为一种调控机制尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算研究单层MnPS₃中极化子的形成，并计算由此产生的磁交换相互作用变化。
AI.result: 极化子能够局部破坏磁对称性并诱导各向异性交换耦合，揭示了一种调控磁结构的新机制。
AI.conclusion: 极化子为二维磁体磁性调控提供了有效手段，为原子尺度磁控设计开辟了新途径，对自旋电子技术具有潜在影响。

title: Magnetism, electronic transport, and disorder in strongly correlated systems
comment: PhD Thesis, Universidad de Buenos Aires, 2026
summary:
This thesis investigates the magnetic, spectral, and transport properties of strongly correlated electronic systems, with a primary focus on the Hubbard model and its extensions relevant for real materials. Within the dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) framework, different regimes of interaction strength, temperature, doping, and magnetic field are explored, highlighting the central role of local electronic correlations in shaping spectral reconstruction and nontrivial transport responses.
  For the antiferromagnetic Hubbard model under a Zeeman field, magnetoresistance and local metamagnetism are characterized, revealing the coexistence of distinct energy scales associated with charge and spin degrees of freedom. A minimal, purely correlation-driven mechanism for generating spin-polarized charge transport in structurally conventional collinear antiferromagnets is identified, controlled by the simultaneous breaking of particle--hole symmetry and antiferromagnetic sublattice equivalence.
  Finally, these concepts are applied to correlated materials with strong spin--orbit coupling, such as Sr$_2$IrO$_4$ and Sr$_3$Ir$_2$O$_7$, and to nanoparticle solids dominated by Coulomb blockade and disorder. The results show how ideas developed in correlated lattice models provide a unified interpretation of metal--insulator transitions and spectral reconstruction in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文在DMFT框架下研究强关联电子系统的磁、谱和输运性质，重点关注Hubbard模型及其扩展，揭示了局域电子关联在谱重构和输运响应中的核心作用，并将理论应用于真实材料。
AI.motivation: 研究强关联电子系统的磁、谱和输运性质，理解局域电子关联如何影响谱重构和非平凡输运响应，为复杂材料中的金属-绝缘体转变和谱重构提供统一解释框架。
AI.method: 采用动力学平均场理论(DMFT)框架，研究Hubbard模型及其扩展，探索不同相互作用强度、温度、掺杂和磁场下的性质，分析反铁磁Hubbard模型在Zeeman场下的磁阻和局域超磁性。
AI.result: 揭示了电荷和自旋自由度共存的不同能量尺度，发现了结构常规共线反铁磁体中纯关联驱动的自旋极化电荷输运机制，该机制由粒子-空穴对称性和反铁磁子晶格等价性的同时破缺控制。
AI.conclusion: 从关联晶格模型发展的思想为复杂系统中的金属-绝缘体转变和谱重构提供了统一解释，成功应用于强自旋-轨道耦合材料和纳米颗粒固体等实际系统。

authors: Roald J. H. van der Kolk
title: Quantum-Material Josephson Junctions: Unconventional Barriers, Emerging Functionality
summary: Josephson junctions translate quantum phase coherence into an electrical response and underpin superconducting sensors and quantum circuits. In conventional junctions, the barrier acts primarily as a passive weak link, however, when the barrier is a quantum material with its own internal degrees of freedom like magnetism, strong correlations, or switchable polarization, the Josephson effect becomes a sensitive probe of symmetry and many-body physics in the interlayer. Here we review progress in quantum-material Josephson junctions, (QMJJ) focusing on three rapidly advancing barrier families: 1. magnetic barriers, where exchange, noncollinearity, and spin-active scattering enable 0-π-φ ground states, singlet-triplet conversion, and nonreciprocal transport, 2. correlated barriers, where proximity effects acquire many-body character and recent van der Waals Kagome Mott interlayers exhibit field-free Josephson diode behavior, and 3. ferroelectric and multiferroic barriers, where nonvolatile polarization provides an internal control knob and can produce superconducting memory and memristive dynamics.

AI.tldr: 综述量子材料约瑟夫森结的研究进展，重点关注磁性、强关联和铁电/多铁性三种屏障材料，探讨其对称性、多体物理和器件应用。
AI.motivation: 传统约瑟夫森结的屏障主要作为被动弱连接，而量子材料屏障具有内部自由度（磁性、强关联、可切换极化），能够将约瑟夫森效应转变为探测对称性和多体物理的敏感工具。
AI.method: 系统综述三类量子材料屏障：1）磁性屏障（交换、非共线、自旋活性散射）；2）强关联屏障（范德华Kagome莫特绝缘层）；3）铁电/多铁性屏障（非易失性极化）。
AI.result: 磁性屏障实现0-π-φ基态、单重态-三重态转换和非互易输运；强关联屏障展现无磁场约瑟夫森二极管行为；铁电/多铁性屏障提供内部控制旋钮，实现超导存储和忆阻动力学。
AI.conclusion: 量子材料约瑟夫森结为探索对称性和多体物理提供了新平台，并有望开发新型超导传感器、量子电路和存储器件。

title: Non-Fermi-liquid behaviour of electrons coupled to gauge phonons
summary: We identify overdamped gauge phonons as a new microscopic route to non-Fermi-liquid behaviour in Dirac materials. These phonons couple to electronic currents rather than densities, thereby realising a lattice analogue of transverse gauge-field mechanisms without requiring proximity to a quantum critical point. By computing the electronic self-energy with a phonon propagator dressed by electron-phonon interactions, we show that the low-energy behaviour is controlled by the orbital susceptibility chi and a dimensionless damping parameter alpha. In the overdamped regime, alpha >> 1, quasiparticles display strong deviations from Fermi-liquid theory. For chi > 0, Fermi-liquid behaviour persists only in a parametrically narrow infrared window before crossing over to non-Fermi-liquid scaling. For chi < 0, the Fermi-liquid regime is replaced by marginal-Fermi-liquid behaviour at the lowest energies, followed by a crossover to non-Fermi-liquid scaling. These results establish strain- induced gauge phonons as a promising source of anomalous metallic behaviour in systems such as twisted bilayer graphene.

AI.tldr: 过阻尼规范声子为狄拉克材料中的非费米液体行为提供了新微观机制，无需量子临界点，通过电子-声子相互作用实现晶格类比横向规范场机制。
AI.motivation: 探索狄拉克材料中非费米液体行为的新物理机制，特别是寻找无需量子临界点的替代途径。传统机制通常需要接近量子临界点，而规范声子提供了一种不同的微观途径。
AI.method: 通过计算电子自能，使用电子-声子相互作用修饰的声子传播子。分析低能行为由轨道磁化率χ和无量纲阻尼参数α控制，特别关注过阻尼区域(α >> 1)。
AI.result: 在过阻尼区域，准粒子显示强偏离费米液体理论的行为：当χ > 0时，费米液体行为仅存在于参数狭窄的红外窗口，随后交叉到非费米液体标度；当χ < 0时，费米液体区域被最低能标下的边际费米液体行为取代，随后交叉到非费米液体标度。
AI.conclusion: 应变诱导的规范声子是扭曲双层石墨烯等系统中异常金属行为的有前景来源，为理解非费米液体行为提供了新的微观机制。

title: Toward bootstrapping tensor-network contractions
summary: Accurate contraction of tensor networks beyond one dimension is essential in various fields including quantum many-body physics. Existing approaches typically rely on approximate contraction schemes and do not provide certified error bars. We introduce a numerical bootstrap framework which casts the problem of tensor-network contractions into a convex optimization problem, thereby yielding certified lower and upper bounds on expectation values of physical observables. As a proof-of-principle, we construct such constraints explicitly for translationally invariant matrix product states and demonstrate that, assuming a canonical form, second-order-cone relaxation can provide tight bounds on the contraction result. We further demonstrate that when the requirement on canonical form is lifted, a more general semidefinite-programming approach could yield similar tight bounds at higher but still polynomial computational cost. Our work suggests numerical bootstrap could be a possible way forward for the rigorous contractions of tensor networks.

AI.tldr: 提出基于数值自举法的张量网络收缩框架，通过凸优化提供物理观测量期望值的可验证上下界
AI.motivation: 现有张量网络收缩方法通常依赖近似方案，缺乏可验证的误差估计，需要一种能提供严格误差界的方法
AI.method: 将张量网络收缩问题转化为凸优化问题，具体实现包括：对于平移不变矩阵乘积态，在规范形式下使用二阶锥松弛；在非规范形式下使用更一般的半定规划方法
AI.result: 证明在规范形式下，二阶锥松弛能提供紧致的收缩结果边界；在非规范形式下，半定规划方法也能获得类似的紧致边界，计算成本虽高但仍是多项式级别
AI.conclusion: 数值自举法为张量网络的严格收缩提供了一条可行路径，能够提供可验证的误差界

title: Identification of sub-angstrom many-body localization in quantum materials by Bragg scattering phase breaking and ultrafast structural dynamics
summary: Defects, fluctuations, degenerate states and correlated interactions facilitate the emergence of exotic properties in condensed matter systems while also inducing atomic-scale local correlated structures that deviate from the average long-range order. Establishing the structure-property relationship from the perspective of these atomic-scale local correlated structures remains ambiguous and controversial due to the lack of direct methods for identifying such local correlated structures. In this work, based on the photoexcited ultrafast structural response, we propose a Bragg scattering phase breaking regime to identify the sub-angstrom local correlated structures in quantum materials. With this regime, we unambiguously identify the many-body-interaction driven local correlated structures with static off-center Ag displacements of 0 to 0.5 angstrom in the low temperature ground state of AgCrSe2. As temperature rising, these static local correlated structures transform to a dynamic state where the thermal fluctuations overwhelm the multiple localized quantum states, signifying the strong anharmonicity of the local structures. The state-of-the-art density functional theory simulation well reproduces the intrinsic many-body-interaction driven local correlated structures. These unique local correlated structures evidence the first many-body localization with topological order characteristic in real material systems and provide a unified scenario for the versatile quantum properties in single crystalline AgCrSe2. Our work not only offers a universal approach to characterize sub-angstrom local correlated structures across a wide range of quantum materials but also deepens our understanding of the fundamental mechanism behind exotic properties from the perspective of atomic-scale local correlated structures.

AI.tldr: 提出基于光激发超快结构响应的布拉格散射相位破缺机制，用于识别量子材料中亚埃尺度的局域关联结构，并在AgCrSe2中发现多体相互作用驱动的局域关联结构
AI.motivation: 缺陷、涨落、简并态和关联相互作用导致凝聚态系统中出现奇异性质，同时产生偏离平均长程有序的原子尺度局域关联结构。由于缺乏直接识别这些局域关联结构的方法，从这一角度建立结构-性质关系仍然模糊且有争议
AI.method: 基于光激发超快结构响应，提出布拉格散射相位破缺机制来识别量子材料中的亚埃尺度局域关联结构。在AgCrSe2中应用该方法，并结合最先进的密度泛函理论模拟验证
AI.result: 明确识别出AgCrSe2低温基态中多体相互作用驱动的局域关联结构，具有0-0.5埃的静态Ag离中心位移。随温度升高，这些静态局域关联结构转变为热涨落主导的动态状态。理论模拟很好地再现了这些内在的多体相互作用驱动的局域关联结构
AI.conclusion: 这些独特的局域关联结构首次在真实材料系统中证明了具有拓扑序特征的多体局域化，并为AgCrSe2单晶的多种量子性质提供了统一解释。该工作不仅提供了表征量子材料中亚埃尺度局域关联结构的普适方法，还从原子尺度局域关联结构的角度深化了对奇异性质基本机制的理解

title: Angle-Resolved Berry Curvature via Nonlinear Hall Effect of Ballistic Electrons
summary: Berry curvature fundamentally dictates the topological ground state, anomalous transport and optical properties of quantum materials. However, directly mapping its momentum-space distribution in real materials remains an outstanding experimental challenge. Here, we present an inverse method for reconstructing the abelian Berry curvature of a single band using angle-resolved measurements of the transverse conductance. Our inversion relies on a symmetry-constrained statistical model with two hyperparameters that can be inferred directly from the nonlinear Hall conductance, yielding a parameter-free inversion method. We demonstrate the feasibility of our method using simulated measurements of tight-binding models of WSe$_2$ and $ABC$-stacked trilayer graphene.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于角分辨横向电导测量的反演方法，用于重建单能带阿贝尔贝里曲率的动量空间分布
AI.motivation: 贝里曲率决定了量子材料的拓扑基态、反常输运和光学性质，但直接测量其实材料中的动量空间分布仍然是一个实验挑战
AI.method: 使用角分辨横向电导测量，结合对称性约束的统计模型和两个超参数，通过非线性霍尔电导推断超参数，实现无参数反演方法
AI.result: 通过WSe₂和ABC堆叠三层石墨烯的紧束缚模型模拟测量，验证了该方法的可行性
AI.conclusion: 该方法为直接映射真实材料中贝里曲率的动量空间分布提供了一种可行的实验方案

title: Chiral-Induced Spin Selectivity Effect in a 1 nm Thin 1,1'-Binaphthyl-2,2'-diyl Hydrogenphosphate Self-Assembled Monolayer on Nickel Oxide
summary: The chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS) effect describes an observed correlation between the orientation of an electron spin transported or transferred through a molecule and that molecule's chirality. Suitable molecules are usually arranged as self-assembled monolayers (SAMs), and the primary CISS systems are based on multiple nanometer-long biomolecules exhibiting helical chirality. Aside from these typically thiolate-anchored molecules, phosphonic and phosphoric acid SAMs may well become significant for those CISS applications that require a more robust molecular coupling to metal oxide surfaces. In this work, we report on our studies, employing the aromatic, low-molecular-mass, axially chiral organophosphoric acid derivative 1,1'-binaphthyl-2,2'-diyl hydrogenphosphate (BNP). Grown as a roughly 1 nm thin SAM on top of a NiOx/Ni substrate, a strong circular dichroism signal indicates that the thin films preserved chirality. The CISS response exhibits a high magnetoresistance with a spin polarization of 50-80% when measured using magnetic-conductive atomic force microscopy. For biases above 0.5 V, the magnetoresistance curves could be well fitted to the Fowler-Nordheim (FN) tunneling model. Using a minimal FN model, we determined that, depending on the magnetization direction and the handedness of the molecules, electrons of a certain spin direction face an effective tunneling barrier at high bias, which is either 80 % higher or 40 % lower compared to the barrier for electrons of the opposite spin direction. Due to the small size of the molecules, their compatibility with oxide materials, and their commercial availability, they are excellent candidates for the realization of novel (nanoscale) organic spintronic devices.

AI.tldr: 研究报道了使用低分子量轴向手性有机磷酸衍生物BNP在NiOx/Ni基底上形成自组装单层膜，展示了强手性诱导自旋选择性效应，在高压下符合Fowler-Nordheim隧穿模型，自旋极化率达50-80%。
AI.motivation: 手性诱导自旋选择性效应通常基于长链生物分子，但需要更稳定的金属氧化物表面耦合。本研究旨在探索小分子、商业可得的有机磷酸衍生物作为CISS应用的新候选材料。
AI.method: 使用芳香性低分子量轴向手性有机磷酸衍生物1,1'-联萘-2,2'-二基氢磷酸酯在NiOx/Ni基底上生长约1纳米厚的自组装单层膜，通过圆二色光谱验证手性保持，采用磁导原子力显微镜测量CISS响应。
AI.result: 薄膜保持强手性信号，磁阻测量显示50-80%的自旋极化率。在偏压高于0.5V时，磁阻曲线符合Fowler-Nordheim隧穿模型，特定自旋方向的电子面临的有效隧穿势垒比相反自旋方向高80%或低40%。
AI.conclusion: BNP小分子因其尺寸小、与氧化物材料兼容性好、商业可得等优点，是实现新型纳米尺度有机自旋电子器件的优秀候选材料。

title: Simulating the influence of stoichiometry on the spectral emissivity of Mo$_x$Si$_y$ thin films
summary: In this work, we simulate the spectral emissivity of various stoichiometric crystal phases of Mo$_x$Si$_y$ compounds using density functional perturbation theory. The dielectric function, including electronic and ionic contributions, is calculated for each phase. We use the bulk properties obtained to simulate the optical absorption spectrum originating from the compound in thin film ($\sim$20 nm) form. We find that most thin films of Mo$_x$Si$_y$ are metallic, however, our results indicate that their emissivity is not simply correlated with the Mo content. For hot metallic films at around 900 K, we predict a maximal emissivity between 5-10 nm thickness. Our results are in good qualitative agreement with experiments, confirming that the emissivity of hexagonal MoSi$_2$ is much lower than in the tetragonal phase. This is related to the small band gap (hexagonal MoSi$_2$) and low density of states at the Fermi level (tetragonal MoSi$_2$). Furthermore, test calculations on defected MoSi$_2$ demonstrate that the infrared emissivity of MoSi$_2$ thin films can be substantially increased by introducing defects.

AI.tldr: 使用密度泛函微扰理论模拟Mo_xSi_y化合物的光谱发射率，发现薄膜发射率与Mo含量无简单相关性，5-10nm厚度在900K时发射率最大，六方相MoSi2发射率远低于四方相，缺陷可显著提高红外发射率。
AI.motivation: 研究不同化学计量比Mo_xSi_y化合物的光谱发射率特性，理解晶体结构对发射率的影响，为薄膜材料的光学性能优化提供理论指导。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函微扰理论计算各晶体相的介电函数（包括电子和离子贡献），基于体相性质模拟约20nm薄膜的光学吸收光谱。
AI.result: 大多数Mo_xSi_y薄膜呈金属性，但发射率与Mo含量无简单相关性；900K时5-10nm厚度发射率最大；六方MoSi2发射率远低于四方相；缺陷可显著提高MoSi2薄膜的红外发射率。
AI.conclusion: Mo_xSi_y化合物的发射率受晶体结构、能带特性和缺陷影响，通过调控这些因素可优化薄膜的光学性能，为高温应用材料设计提供理论依据。

title: Substrate-controlled nucleation and growth kinetics in ultrathin Bi$_2$Te$_3$ films
summary:
Metal chalcogenides are promising layered topological materials, yet their electronic performance is often limited by parasitic bulk conduction arising from defects that introduce excess carriers and shift the Fermi level out of the topological regime. Controlling early-stage growth and defect formation is therefore essential for suppressing bulk transport and enhancing surface-state conduction. Here we investigate ultrathin Bi2Te3 films grown by pulsed laser deposition on substrates spanning van der Waals, lattice-matched, and amorphous regimes to determine how substrate-dependent nucleation pathways influence defect formation and electronic transport.
  Phase-pure, c-axis-oriented Bi2Te3 forms on all substrates, but the growth morphology varies strongly. Layered growth with well-defined quintuple-layer terraces is governed primarily by substrate roughness rather than lattice match: atomically smooth mica and step-terraced SrTiO3 yield continuous terraces, whereas rougher BaF2 and amorphous Si3N4 produce island-structured films. Between the two smooth substrates, the higher surface energy of SrTiO3 enhances adatom adsorption and nucleation density, promoting rapid vertical growth and early Te depletion.
  Transport measurements reveal n-type conduction with carrier densities of 10e19-10e20 cm-3. The highest carrier density occurs for films on SrTiO3, consistent with defect formation during high-density nucleation, whereas mobility correlates with structural coherence and terrace formation. Weak anti-localization signatures confirm phase-coherent transport in films on mica and SrTiO3. These results show that substrate roughness and nucleation density provide key levers for controlling defect formation and strengthening topological surface transport in Bi2Te3 thin films.

AI.tldr: 研究不同衬底对Bi2Te3薄膜生长、缺陷形成和电子输运的影响，发现衬底粗糙度和成核密度是关键控制因素
AI.motivation: 金属硫族化合物是有前景的层状拓扑材料，但其电子性能常受限于缺陷引起的寄生体传导，需要控制早期生长和缺陷形成来抑制体传导并增强表面态传导
AI.method: 使用脉冲激光沉积在范德华、晶格匹配和非晶衬底上生长超薄Bi2Te3薄膜，研究衬底依赖的成核途径如何影响缺陷形成和电子输运
AI.result: 所有衬底上都形成相纯、c轴取向的Bi2Te3，但生长形貌差异显著。原子级平滑的云母和SrTiO3产生连续台阶，而粗糙的BaF2和非晶Si3N4产生岛状结构。SrTiO3的高表面能增强吸附原子吸附和成核密度，导致快速垂直生长和早期Te耗尽。输运测量显示n型传导，SrTiO3上的薄膜载流子密度最高，迁移率与结构相干性和台阶形成相关
AI.conclusion: 衬底粗糙度和成核密度为控制Bi2Te3薄膜中缺陷形成和增强拓扑表面输运提供了关键调控手段
